examples.english: Poisonous substances, such as garden chemicals, should be clearly labelled.
examples.chinese: 像园艺化学制品之类的有毒物质应该贴上醒目的标签。

examples.english: Resin is a dark, sticky substance.
examples.chinese: 树脂是一种深色黏性的物质。

examples.english: the problem of disposing of radioactive substances
examples.chinese: 处置放射性物质的难题

examples.english: The green colour of the leaf is due to a substance called chlorophyll.
examples.chinese: 叶子之所以是绿色的是因为一种称为叶绿素的物质在起作用。

examples.english: Steel is a stronger material than iron.
examples.chinese: 钢是一种比铁坚硬的材料。

examples.english: The company supplies building materials such as bricks and cement.
examples.chinese: 这家公司供应砖和水泥之类的建筑材料。

examples.english: A layer of insulating material should be placed between the panels and the solid wall.
examples.chinese: 在嵌板和实心墙之间应该加一层绝缘材料。

examples.english: What's that sticky stuff on the floor?
examples.chinese: 地上那黏乎乎的东西是什么?

examples.english: Do you have any of that clear plastic stuff to cover food with?
examples.chinese: 你有那种透明的用来盖食物的塑料东西吗？

examples.english: They are investigating an area of space that contains more than the usual amount of matter.
examples.chinese: 他们在探究一片太空区域，那里的物质密度高于通常水平。

examples.english: the forces exerted between particles of matter
examples.chinese: 物质的粒子之间的吸引力

examples.english: In order to decompose, all vegetable matter needs supplies of nitrogen.
examples.chinese: 所有植物性物质的分解都需要氮气的供应。

examples.english: Dietary fibre makes waste matter from the food we eat pass through our bodies quickly.
examples.chinese: 膳食纤维使我们吃下去的食物中的废物很快地经过我们体内。

centers.english: material for making clothes, curtains etc
centers.chinese: 用于制衣服、窗帘等的布料

examples.english: She was wearing a long black dress made of some silky material.
examples.chinese: 她穿了一条某种丝质布料做的黑色长连衣裙。

examples.english: Some materials are easier to dye than others.
examples.chinese: 有些布料要比别的布更容易染色。

examples.english: Could I have six metres of that curtain material?
examples.chinese: 那种窗帘布料给我剪六米，行吗？

examples.english: I want to buy some fabric to make a skirt.
examples.chinese: 我要买些布料做条裙子。

examples.english: Man-made fabrics such as polyester are easy to wash and iron.
examples.chinese: 人造织物如聚酯纤维等很容易洗熨。

examples.english: Rayon is used extensively to make furnishing fabrics.
examples.chinese: 人造丝被广泛用于制造家具布料。

examples.english: The main trade was the production of woollen cloth.
examples.chinese: 主要的生意是生产毛料。

examples.english: She ran her eye over the rolls of brightly-coloured cloth displayed on the stall.
examples.chinese: 她打量着摊位上陈列的一卷卷色彩鲜艳的布料。

examples.english: The diamonds were contained in cloth bags bags made of cloth.
examples.chinese: 钻石装在布袋内。

examples.english: Textiles are one of Mexico's main exports.
examples.chinese: 纺织品是墨西哥主要出口产品之一。

examples.english: Modern textiles can look too bright in an old building.
examples.chinese: 现代纺织品在旧建筑内看起来可能显得太鲜亮。

examples.english: The textile industry is booming, with profits up 15% on last year.
examples.chinese: 纺织业正飞速发展，利润比去年增加了15%。

centers.english: when methods, systems, explanations, or words are not complicated
centers.chinese: 方法、系统、解释或单词不复杂的

examples.english: Speak slowly and use simple words so that everyone understands.
examples.chinese: 慢慢地说，使用简单的词语，让大家都能听明白。

examples.english: His children find European numbering simpler than the Chinese system.
examples.chinese: 他的孩子觉得欧洲人使用的编号方式比中国人的系统简单。

examples.english: There must be a perfectly simple explanation.
examples.chinese: 肯定有极为简单的解释。

examples.english: Many vegetarian meals are delicious and simple to prepare.
examples.chinese: 许多素食都很美味，做起来也简单。

examples.english: The secret of successful dinner parties? Keep it simple.
examples.chinese: 晚宴成功秘诀？尽量简单。

examples.english: Try to express your ideas more simply.
examples.chinese: 尽量把你的观点说得再明白一点。

examples.english: The simplicity of the system is its great advantage.
examples.chinese: 这个系统简单易用是它的一大优点。

examples.english: For simplicity, let's pretend for a moment that the Earth does not revolve.
examples.chinese: 为了简单起见，我们暂时假设地球是不转的。

examples.english: The new networking system is fairly straightforward - you shouldn't have any problems.
examples.chinese: 这个新的网络系统相当简单——你应该不会有什么问题。

examples.english: There are two straightforward ways of achieving this result.
examples.chinese: 有两个简单的方法可以取得这个结果。

examples.english: Tom can now carry out uncomplicated tasks without help.
examples.chinese: 汤姆现在可以无需帮助而完成一些简单的任务。

examples.english: There are several basic techniques to learn, but they are uncomplicated enough to be mastered in one session.
examples.chinese: 有几个基本的技巧要学习，但是并不难，一节课就能掌握。

examples.english: It may be a pretty unsophisticated system, but it has worked well for over fifty years.
examples.chinese: 这也许是个十分简单的系统，但是五十多年了，一直都运作良好。

examples.english: In comparison with modern methods, it seems an incredibly slow and unsophisticated way of making cars.
examples.chinese: 与现代的生产方式相比，用这种方法制造汽车显得极其缓慢，极其简陋。

examples.english: She had difficulty with even the most elementary tasks.
examples.chinese: 她甚至做最简单的工作都有困难。

examples.english: an elementary course in word-processing
examples.chinese: 文字处理基础课程

examples.english: I wish they'd write in plain English, instead of all this business jargon.
examples.chinese: 我希望他们能用简单的英语写，不要用这种商业行话。

examples.english: ‘The theory of informed consent’? What does that mean, in plain English?
examples.chinese: “知情同意论”？用简单的英语说是什么意思？

examples.english: Here are my calculations. They're a little rough and ready as yet, but you'll get a general idea.
examples.chinese: 这是我的计算结果，虽然目前还有点粗略，但你可以大概了解一下。

examples.english: Justice was administered in a rough and ready fashion, without using courts or juries.
examples.chinese: 审判以很简单的方式进行，没有经过法院，也没有陪审团参与。

centers.english: when machines or tools are not complicated

examples.english: The tribes of Central New Guinea use very simple tools such as hammers and axes.
examples.chinese: 新几内亚中部的各部落使用非常简单的工具，如锤子和斧子。

examples.english: Very young children will be satisfied with the simplest of toys.
examples.chinese: 幼儿有最简单的玩具就能满足。

examples.english: The hospital lacked even the most basic medical equipment.
examples.chinese: 这家医院连最基本的医疗设备都没有。

examples.english: It's only six years old, but already my home PC is basic compared to today's models.
examples.chinese: 我的家用个人电脑只用了六年，但是和今天的型号相比已经太简单了。

examples.english: The men started gathering wood to construct a crude shelter.
examples.chinese: 那些男人开始收集木头搭建一个简陋的棚子。

examples.english: The earliest skis were crude, consisting of short boards covered in fur skins.
examples.chinese: 最早的滑雪板很简单，由一块短木板外面包一层毛皮制成。

examples.english: Babbage's great calculating machine was a crude form of computer.
examples.chinese: 巴比奇那台了不起的计算机器就是电脑的雏型。

examples.english: They lived in crudely built huts.
examples.chinese: 他们住在简陋的小棚屋里。

examples.english: In those days, dental equipment was primitive and a visit to the dentist was a painful experience.
examples.chinese: 那时候牙科设备很简陋，看牙医是件痛苦的事。

examples.english: It is a primitive but effective device for raising water from a well.
examples.chinese: 这是从井里汲水的一种简陋但很有效的装置。

examples.english: a primitive design
examples.chinese: 粗糙简单的设计

examples.english: The tools that the ancient Egyptians used to build their temples were extremely rudimentary.
examples.chinese: 古埃及人用来建筑神庙的工具极其简单。

examples.english: The system has a rudimentary Internet browser, but it's very slow.
examples.chinese: 这个系统有最基本的互联网浏览器，但是非常慢。

examples.english: They still use some relatively unsophisticated machinery.
examples.chinese: 他们仍然使用相对简单的机器。

examples.english: It may look unsophisticated compared to modern high-tech cameras, but it produces fantastic pictures.
examples.chinese: 和现代的高科技相机相比，这也许看来是不够精细，但是成像效果绝佳。

examples.english: The company manufactures the low-tech parts in Mexico, and then assembles here.
examples.chinese: 该公司在墨西哥生产低技术含量的部件，然后到这里来装配。

examples.english: He uses low-tech theatrical devices to great effect.
examples.chinese: 他极其有效地运用了一些低技术的剧场设备。

examples.english: The government is planning to simplify the tax laws.
examples.chinese: 政府计划简化税法。

examples.english: These gadgets do simplify food preparation, but are they really worth the money?
examples.chinese: 这些小东西确实简化了准备食物的过程，但是真值那么多钱吗？

examples.english: The text uses simplified Chinese characters.
examples.chinese: 文本使用简体汉字。

examples.english: a simplified form of worship
examples.chinese: 简化的敬拜形式

examples.english: The new computer has made it possible to streamline our data processing operations.
examples.chinese: 新的电脑使我们能够简化数据处理的操作。

examples.english: The Cut and Paste command can be used to streamline the process of inserting information.
examples.chinese: 剪贴指令可以简化信息插入的过程。

examples.english: There will be no layoffs, thanks to streamlined administration and government subsidies.
examples.chinese: 不会有人遭到解雇，因为行政精简了，还有政府的补助。

centers.english: to make something seem simpler than it really is
centers.chinese: 使某事显得比实际简单

examples.english: There's a tendency in news reports to oversimplify complex issues to make the news more entertaining.
examples.chinese: 新闻报道往往会把复杂的问题过分简单化，使新闻听起来更具娱乐性。

examples.english: I know I'm oversimplifying, but these are the values on which I try to base my decisions.
examples.chinese: 我知道我是把问题太简单化了，但是这些观念是我作决定的基础。

examples.english: We were presented with a vastly oversimplified version of events.
examples.chinese: 这些事件交到我们手里是经过大大简化后的版本。

examples.english: This statement is an oversimplification, but it contains an element of truth.
examples.chinese: 这个声明是过分简化了，但还是有真实的成分。

examples.english: a simplistic ‘more is better’ philosophy
examples.chinese: 一种过分简单化的“多多益善”的人生哲学

examples.english: His critics say it may have been overly simplistic to use only two experimental methods.
examples.chinese: 他的批评者说仅仅使用两种实验方法未免过于简单化。

examples.english: It would be simplistic to suggest that the Bible promotes male domination.
examples.chinese: 说《圣经》提倡男权统治未免太过简单。

examples.english: I know I shouldn't generalize, but I do think men find it hard to show their feelings.
examples.chinese: 我知道不应该一概而论，但我确实觉得男人不善表露自己的情感。

examples.english: The study group was very small, and it's hard to generalize from just a few cases.
examples.chinese: 研究组很小，而且仅仅几个案例也很难得出概括性结论。

examples.english: The polls show that it is difficult to generalize about which issues were most important to voters.
examples.chinese: 民意调查显示，很难笼统地说哪些问题对于选民来说是最重要的。

examples.english: I know it's a generalization, but you must admit that bands these days have less originality than in the past.
examples.chinese: 我知道这么说是很笼统，但是你不得不承认，现在的乐队没有过去的有创造性了。

expressions.text: see things in black and white

examples.english: My son sees life in black and white. To him, the world is full of greedy capitalists and underpaid workers.
examples.chinese: 我儿子看待生活很绝对。在他看来，世界全是贪婪的资本家和薪水微薄的工人。

centers.english: not having a lot of decoration or things added
centers.chinese: 没有很多装饰或附加的东西

examples.english: She wore a simple black dress.
examples.chinese: 她穿了一件素净的黑色连衣裙。

examples.english: The meal was simple, but delicious.
examples.chinese: 饭菜很简单，但是很可口。

examples.english: He put the letter in a plain brown envelope.
examples.chinese: 他把信装进一个普通的棕色信封里。

examples.english: Do you have any plain white shirts?
examples.chinese: 你有没有纯白的衬衫？

examples.english: The chapel was a small, plain, white-washed building.
examples.chinese: 教堂是一座粉刷得雪白的简朴小楼。

examples.english: Some of the hotels in the mountains are pretty basic.
examples.chinese: 山里的有些旅馆只有很基本的设施。

examples.english: The basic model costs £30,000, which includes insurance and car tax.
examples.chinese: 基本型号是30,000英镑，包括保险和汽车税。

examples.english: basic cooking utensils
examples.chinese: 基本的炊具

examples.english: Students ate in an austere hall built by New England Puritans.
examples.chinese: 学生们在一个简陋的大礼堂里就餐，这礼堂是新英格兰的清教徒建造的。

examples.english: The crematorium chapel was cold and austere.
examples.chinese: 火葬场的祈祷室冷冷的，也很简陋。

examples.english: Protestant churches often have an appearance of extreme simplicity and austerity.
examples.chinese: 新教教堂通常都有极其简单朴素的外观。

examples.english: The accommodation is pretty spartan, so take extra blankets and bedding.
examples.chinese: 住处十分简朴，所以要另外带毯子和寝具。

examples.english: It was a spartan existence, with no running water or electricity.
examples.chinese: 生活条件很艰苦，没有自来水，也没有电。

examples.english: The waiting room was stark, with hard, stiff chairs and lit by a single lightbulb.
examples.chinese: 候车室空荡荡的，硬邦邦的椅子，只亮着一盏灯泡。

examples.english: stark chrome furniture
examples.chinese: 简陋的铬合金家具

examples.english: The jacket follows the lines of the body with graceful simplicity.
examples.chinese: 夹克很合身，设计优雅简朴。

examples.english: Van Gogh was attracted to the beauty and simplicity of a common table or kitchen chair.
examples.chinese: 一张普通的餐桌或餐椅，梵高也能被它们的美和简单所吸引。

examples.english: The Lodge is nothing fancy -- just a row of cottages huddled on the side of a hill overlooking the sea.
examples.chinese: “小旅馆”很简陋—只是一排聚在山腰上的面海小屋。

examples.english: This was his favourite meal. Nothing fancy, just steak and salad.
examples.chinese: 这是他最喜欢的饭菜，没有什么特别的，只是牛排和沙拉。

examples.english: The meeting was held at a no-frills hotel 30 minutes from corporate headquarters.
examples.chinese: 会议在一家实惠的宾馆里召开，宾馆离公司总部30分钟的路程。

examples.english: Try the smaller, no-frills airlines for cheap late flights.
examples.chinese: 到小一点、只有基本服务的航空公司去问问有没有便宜的夜间航班。

examples.english: The story's very complicated - I can't remember the exact details.
examples.chinese: 这故事很复杂，我记不住那些细节。

examples.english: The student advice office provides details of all the university courses in the country.
examples.chinese: 学生咨询处提供全国各大学课程的详细资料。

examples.english: Baker advises the President on the details of foreign policy.
examples.chinese: 贝克就外交政策的细节问题向总统提供建议。

examples.english: To apply for a loan, first fill in the section marked ‘Personal Details’.
examples.chinese: 要申请贷款先要填写标有“个人详情”字样的部分。

examples.english: For full details of this exclusive offer, just send in a stamped addressed envelope.
examples.chinese: 欲知有关这项独家优惠的详情，寄上贴有邮票写有姓名地址的信封即可。

examples.english: The donated liver came from the UK, but the hospital is giving no further details.
examples.chinese: 捐赠的肝脏来自英国，但医院未透露其他细节。

examples.english: There's one point in your letter that is not quite clear.
examples.chinese: 你的来信中有一点不大清楚。！

examples.english: Almost everything has been agreed. There is just one final point that needs to be settled.
examples.chinese: 差不多每一件事都通过了，就还有最后一点必须要定下来。

examples.english: We only have a few small points left to discuss.
examples.chinese: 我们仅余下几处小条款留待讨论。

examples.english: There's one thing I'm not clear about, and that's how we are going to get to the airport.
examples.chinese: 我有一点不清楚，就是我们要怎么去机场呢？

examples.english: In the new version of the story, a few things have been changed.
examples.chinese: 在该故事的新版中，有几处内容改动过了。

examples.english: I gave him all the particulars he needed: my name, address, and the name of the hospital where I work.
examples.chinese: 我给了他所需的一切详细资料：我的姓名、地址以及我工作的医院名称。

examples.english: The treaty was signed despite some haggling over the particulars of each country's stock of weapons.
examples.chinese: 尽管在各国武器储备的具体细节上各方仍争论不休，条约还是签署了。

examples.english: After the police officer had taken down their particulars, the two men explained what had happened.
examples.chinese: 警察将这两名男子的个人资料记下来之后，他们便开始解释所发生的事情。

examples.english: It ought to be possible for partners to disagree on specifics while agreeing in general terms.
examples.chinese: 合作各方应该有可能在同意总体条件的情况下对某些细节保留分歧。

examples.english: Few of the specifics of James’ proposals were implemented.
examples.chinese: 詹姆斯所提的建议中几乎没有什么细节被采用。

examples.english: Now that we've agreed on the general principles of our policy, let's get down to specifics.
examples.chinese: 既然我们在政策的基本原则上已取得了一致的意见，那我们就来谈论一下细节问题吧。

expressions.text: the ins and outs of something

examples.english: I can't tell you all the ins and outs of the situation over the phone, I'll write to you next week.
examples.chinese: 在电话里我无法告诉你详细情况，下星期我写信给你。

examples.english: I found I needed to spend quite a while learning all the ins and outs of the system.
examples.chinese: 我觉得我需要花好一段时间来学习这个系统的操作细节。

examples.english: You've got to get down to the nitty-gritty: how the stage will look, what the lighting will be like, and who designs the costumes.
examples.chinese: 你得开始考虑最基本的细节：舞台如何布置、灯光怎么打，以及谁负责设计服装。

examples.english: Kennedy immersed himself in the nitty-gritty details of the prosecutions.
examples.chinese: 肯尼迪全神贯注地研究起诉中的种种细节。

examples.english: He got a job at a printer's and quickly learned the technicalities such as paper sizes and the processes involved.
examples.chinese: 他在一家印刷公司找到了一份工作，很快就掌握了诸如纸张尺寸及印刷流程一类的技术细节。

examples.english: They discussed the technicalities of this delicate operation for some time.
examples.chinese: 他们对这个精细手术的技术性细节讨论了好一段时间。

examples.english: Although most of us do not know much about the technicalities of surveys, we have a broad idea of what they are about.
examples.chinese: 尽管我们中的大部分人对民意调查的技术细节不大清楚，但对此我们都有个大致的概念。

examples.english: Don't get bogged down in factual minutiae.
examples.chinese: 别让事实性的细枝末节误事。

examples.english: He carefully recorded the minutiae of his social life in his diary.
examples.chinese: 他在日记中仔细记录了自己社交生活的细节。

centers.english: small details in a contract or set of rules
centers.chinese: 合同或规则等中的细节内容

examples.english: I'm afraid you can't cancel your contract now. You should have read the small print.
examples.chinese: 恐怕你现在不能取消合同了，你应该看一看附属细则。

examples.english: A close study of the small print will reveal that many of these insurance policies do not cover the cost of repairing storm damage.
examples.chinese: 如果把细则仔细研究一下，就会发现这其中许多保险单不包括风暴所造成的损坏的修理费。

examples.english: The vote was declared invalid because of a technicality.
examples.chinese: 这次表决因一项技术性的细则而被宣布无效。

examples.english: Baxter was released on a technicality because his ‘offence’ was committed in the city, and only a city judge had the authority to sign the warrant.
examples.chinese: 巴克斯特因一项技术细节而获释放，因为他的“罪行”是在市内犯下的，而只有市法官才有权签署逮捕令。

examples.english: The police have issued a detailed description of the man they are looking for.
examples.chinese: 警方发布了正在寻找的那名男子的详细描述。

examples.english: Do you have a more detailed map of the area?
examples.chinese: 你有这地区更详细的地图吗?

examples.english: Her biography is clear, detailed, and illuminating.
examples.chinese: 她的传记叙述清晰，内容详细，富于启发。

examples.english: I haven't had time to look at the plans in detail yet.
examples.chinese: 我还没有时间仔细研究这些计划。

examples.english: This problem is discussed in more detail in Chapter 7.
examples.chinese: 这个问题在第七章有更为详尽的探讨。

examples.english: Fortunately, she was able to describe her attacker in great detail.
examples.chinese: 幸好她能够对袭击者进行详细描述。

examples.english: The layout of the house had been described to me in some detail.
examples.chinese: 他们颇为详尽地向我描述了房子的设计。

examples.english: The diaries have been published in one volume, with elaborate biographical notes by Professor Emson.
examples.chinese: 这些日记已被装成一册发表了，上面有埃姆森教授所写的详尽的生平。

examples.english: The lawyer had concocted an elaborate defence that gave a totally false impression of what happened.
examples.chinese: 该律师编出一篇周密的辩护辞，让人对发生的事有全然错误的印象。

examples.english: She had prepared an elaborate excuse for her absence.
examples.chinese: 她为缺席编好了一个巧妙的借口。

examples.english: Without going into detail, I can tell you that we have had a very successful year.
examples.chinese: 我可以大致地告诉你，去年我们非常成功。

examples.english: Be brief. If you go into too much detail people will get bored.
examples.chinese: 简要一点。如果你说得太详细，人们会烦闷的。

examples.english: Chapter 1 is a brief outline of the process, then the next chapter goes into all the technical details.
examples.chinese: 第一章对这个工序作了简要的概述，然后在下一章里对所有的技术细节作了详细的介绍。

examples.english: The order specifies a December deadline for completion of the work.
examples.chinese: 订单上明确写道，12月份为最后完工期限。

examples.english: The rules clearly specify that competitors are not allowed to accept payment.
examples.chinese: 条文明确规定，参赛者都不准接受报酬。

examples.english: Architects usually specify which particular hardwood they want to use.
examples.chinese: 建筑师一般会明确说明他们要用哪一种特别的硬木料。

examples.english: His memoirs are simply a blow-by-blow account of battles, and contain very little personal comment or reflection.
examples.chinese: 他的回忆录只是对战斗的详细叙述，几乎没有个人的评述或看法。

examples.english: The committee has ordered an in-depth study of juvenile crime.
examples.chinese: 委员会已经下令对青少年犯罪作深入的调查。

examples.english: We shall be conducting a series of in-depth interviews with economic experts.
examples.chinese: 我们将对一些经济专家作一连串深入的采访。

examples.english: The aim of the neighbourhood studies was to obtain in-depth information from a number of selected communities.
examples.chinese: 此次街区情况研究的目标是要从几个选中作调查的社区获得深入详尽的信息。

examples.english: The course is called ‘A General Introduction to Computing’.
examples.chinese: 这门课程叫做“计算概论”。

examples.english: This general description of the countryside oversimplifies what is really a very complicated pattern of soils and climate.
examples.chinese: 对农村地区的这一概述把实际上很复杂的土壤及气候模式过于简单化了。

examples.english: This guidebook will give you a good general idea of the city.
examples.chinese: 这本导游书能使你对该城市有个很好的总体概念。

examples.english: We've drawn up a rough plan but we haven't worked out all the costs.
examples.chinese: 我们已经起草了一个粗略的方案，但各项费用还没有算出来。

examples.english: I have not been able to do more than suggest the rough outline of this approach.
examples.chinese: 我除了提出这一方案的大致框架外，别无更多好主意。

examples.english: Give us a rough idea of what you're trying to do.
examples.chinese: 你想怎么做，给我们一个大体概念吧。

examples.english: Can you give me a broad outline of what the speech was about?
examples.chinese: 你能给我大概地叙述一下演讲的内容吗?

examples.english: It's only a short course, but it's enough to give you a broad understanding of the subject.
examples.chinese: 这只是个短期课程，不过已足够使你们对这门课有个大致的了解了。

examples.english: To say that people are healthier than they used to be is a broad generalization -- the reality is a little more complex.
examples.chinese: 说人们比以前健康了，这比较笼统—实际情况要稍微复杂一些。

examples.english: Students taking this course need to have at least an outline knowledge of computing.
examples.chinese: 修这门课的学生至少得对电脑操作有个大概的了解。

examples.english: The two leaders have reached an outline agreement on controlling short range nuclear weapons.
examples.chinese: 那两位领导人在短程核武器的限制上已经达成一个粗略的协议。

examples.english: It was only a quick explanation - he didn't really go into detail.
examples.chinese: 他只是很快地解释了一下，并没有真正触及细节。

examples.english: Dave's instructions were rather vague.
examples.chinese: 戴夫的指示很含糊。

examples.english: I had heard vague rumours that they were getting married.
examples.chinese: 我隐约听到传闻，说他们就要结婚了。

examples.english: It would be very unwise to change our policy on the basis of such a sketchy report.
examples.chinese: 凭着这么一份粗略的报告就来改变我们的策略，那是十分不明智的。

examples.english: I'm afraid my knowledge of the subject is rather sketchy.
examples.chinese: 恐怕我这方面的知识很粗浅。

examples.english: I was disappointed with your history essay, it seemed a little thin in terms of content.
examples.chinese: 我对你的历史论文很失望，在内容上好像有点空泛。

examples.english: I'm afraid the evidence is really too thin as it stands. We need to investigate further.
examples.chinese: 从这个证据来看恐怕是太单薄了。我们需要作进一步的调查。

centers.english: to add details to what you have said

examples.english: Can you give me more details about the cost of these courses, please?
examples.chinese: 你能更具体地告诉我这些课程的费用吗

examples.english: The press officer was unable to give any more details about the assassination attempt.
examples.chinese: 这位新闻处官员无法对这次企图刺杀事件提供更详细的情况。

examples.english: Could you expand on your last comment, please?
examples.chinese: 你把最后一个意见详细阐述一下好吗？

examples.english: When asked to expand on his accusations of injustice, the journalist refused to say any more.
examples.chinese: 当人们要求那名记者进一步解释他有关不公正行为的指控时，他拒绝说得更多。

examples.english: I was unsure whether this was meant as an insult or a compliment, but he didn't choose to enlarge on his remark.
examples.chinese: 我拿不准这话算是侮辱还是称赞，但他不肯把话再说得详细些。

examples.english: I don't have time to go into more detail. Perhaps we could talk about this tomorrow.
examples.chinese: 我没有时间详谈了，也许我们可以明天再谈这件事。

examples.english: I would like you to tell your story to my colleagues, and they may want you to go into greater detail.
examples.chinese: 我希望你能把你的事告诉我的同事，而他们可能会要求你更详细地讲一讲的。

examples.english: Her talk was interesting, but I wish she'd gone into more detail about the early part of her career.
examples.chinese: 她的谈话很有意思，不过我希望她能把她早年所从事的职业讲得再详细一些。

examples.english: I don't understand what your plan is exactly. Could you be a little more specific?
examples.chinese: 我不明白你的计划的确切情况，你能再明确一点吗？

expressions.text: be more specific/be more explicit about

examples.english: The main political parties need to be much more explicit about their policies for the environment.
examples.chinese: 这些主要的政党得更为明确地说明一下他们在环境保护方面的政策。

examples.english: What exactly do you mean by ‘traditional education’? Would you care to elaborate?
examples.chinese: 你说的“传统教育”确切地是指什么？你可以详述一下吗？

examples.english: I would like now to elaborate upon the points raised in my introduction.
examples.chinese: 现在我想详细阐述一下我在引言中所提出的这些要点。

examples.english: This argument will be elaborated more fully in the next chapter.
examples.chinese: 这个论点将在下一章进一步详细阐述。

examples.english: In the next chapter I want to explore the question of the cultural boundaries between different subjects. Specifically I will look at what we mean by the terms ‘art’ and ‘science’.
examples.chinese: 下一章我要探讨一下不同学科之间的文化界限问题。我会具体地解释我们所说的“艺术”和“科学”的含义。

examples.english: Don't be so pedantic - does it really matter if I don't pronounce it right?
examples.chinese: 别这么学究气了—我发音不准真有那么不得了吗?

examples.english: The papers were stacked with pedantic neatness on his desk.
examples.chinese: 试卷过分整齐地叠放在他书桌上。

examples.english: The booklet that accompanies the CD is informative and scholarly, without being pedantic.
examples.chinese: 随光盘附上的小册子内容丰富而且具学术性，但一点也不迁腐。

examples.english: My grandmother was a notoriously fussy housekeeper.
examples.chinese: 我的祖母是个人所共知喜欢挑剔的管家婆。

examples.english: Although he spent three years writing these songs, the album does not sound fussy or labored.
examples.chinese: 尽管他花了三年写这些歌，但是这张专辑听起来并没有过分雕琢或不自然的味道。

examples.english: He's very fussy about his drinks being served in the right kind of glass.
examples.chinese: 他对喝酒要用合适的酒杯是很讲究的。

examples.english: Add most of the flour to the liquid and stir the mixture.
examples.chinese: 把一大半面粉倒入水中，然后搅拌。

examples.english: She screamed as the boiling liquid burned her skin.
examples.chinese: 滚烫的液体烫到她的皮肤，她尖叫了起来。

examples.english: Treat your plants once a week with liquid fertiliser.
examples.chinese: 给植物一个星期施一次液体肥料。

examples.english: liquid soap
examples.chinese: 肥皂液

examples.english: liquid nitrogen
examples.chinese: 液态氮

examples.english: In extreme heat your body will lose fluid and salt.
examples.chinese: 在极度高温中，人体会流失水分和盐分。

examples.english: Brake fluid was leaking out from under my car.
examples.chinese: 制动液从我的汽车底部漏了出来。

examples.english: The HIV virus is transmitted though body fluids, during sexual intercourse.
examples.chinese: 艾滋病病毒在性交的时候通过体液传播。

examples.english: Big drops of rain slid down the window pane.
examples.chinese: 大滴大滴的雨水从窗户玻璃上滑下来。

examples.english: Add a few drops of vanilla essence, the egg white and half the butter.
examples.chinese: 加入几滴香草精、蛋白和半块黄油。

examples.english: She applied a few drops of perfume behind her ears and smiled at her reflection in the mirror.
examples.chinese: 她在耳朵后面抹了几滴香水，对着镜子里的自己微笑。

examples.english: Rita dropped a blob of paint on the new carpet.
examples.chinese: 丽塔把一滴油漆滴落在新地毯上。

examples.english: Blobs of wax had dripped from the candle onto the table cloth.
examples.chinese: 蜡烛油一滴滴地落到了桌布上。

examples.english: Put a blob of glue on each surface and carefully press together.
examples.chinese: 在每一个表面上涂上一滴胶水，然后小心地贴在一起。

examples.english: Trautman was lying in a pool of blood.
examples.chinese: 特劳特曼倒卧在血泊之中。

examples.english: A pool of oil had collected under the car.
examples.chinese: 那部汽车下面集了一摊油。

examples.english: The paint was too thin, and was dripping everywhere.
examples.chinese: 颜料太稀，滴得到处都是。

examples.english: For these crepes you will need a fairly thin batter, so do not add too much flour.
examples.chinese: 做这种煎饼要用比较稀的面糊，所以不要放太多的面粉。

examples.english: a boiled egg with a runny yolk
examples.chinese: 一个溏黄的煮鸡蛋

examples.english: runny custard
examples.chinese: 稀稀的牛奶蛋糊

examples.english: The coffee is horrible - really weak and watery.
examples.chinese: 这咖啡味道不好—很淡，像水一样。

examples.english: All they had to eat for weeks was bread and watery cabbage soup.
examples.chinese: 一连几个星期他们吃到的只有面包和清水般的白菜汤。

centers.english: a liquid that is almost solid

examples.english: If you want to make the sauce thicker, add flour.
examples.chinese: 如果要酱汁稠一点，就加面粉。

examples.english: thick vegetable soup
examples.chinese: 蔬菜浓汤

examples.english: This gravy is lumpy.
examples.chinese: 这肉汁中有结块。

examples.english: I hate lumpy porridge.
examples.chinese: 我最讨厌有团块的粥。

examples.english: The tomato soup was hot, creamy and delicious.
examples.chinese: 番茄汤热腾腾的，很香滑可口。

examples.english: Add the chocolate to the butter and eggs, stirring the mixture until it is thick and creamy.
examples.chinese: 在黄油和鸡蛋中加入巧克力，把混和物搅拌至浓稠软滑。

examples.english: Beat the eggs and flour until they are smooth.
examples.chinese: 把鸡蛋和面粉打至均匀。

examples.english: Blend the strawberries with a little icing sugar in a food processor until it forms a smooth purée.
examples.chinese: 给草莓加入一点糖粉，放在食品加工机里搅拌成均匀的糊状。

examples.english: Mix the flour in just enough milk to make a smooth paste.
examples.chinese: 面粉中加入适量的牛奶调成均匀的糊状。

examples.english: Tahini is a paste made from ground sesame seeds.
examples.chinese: 芝麻酱是用磨碎的芝麻做成的一种酱。

examples.english: He made a paste of mud and water.
examples.chinese: 他用泥和水调成泥浆。

examples.english: The chocolate had melted and was all over the inside of her pocket.
examples.chinese: 巧克力融化了，弄得她口袋里全是。

examples.english: Melt the butter in a saucepan and stir in the sugar.
examples.chinese: 把黄油放在平底锅里融化，然后拌入糖。

examples.english: a pasta dish topped with melted cheese
examples.chinese: 上面盖了一层融化的奶酪的意大利面

examples.english: The crystals dissolve in water to create a purple liquid.
examples.chinese: 结晶体在水中溶解，形成一种紫色的液体。

examples.english: Dissolve the salt in 125 ml of hot water.
examples.chinese: 把盐放在125毫升的热水中溶解。

examples.english: The lake is frozen all winter, but it usually thaws in March.
examples.chinese: 整个冬季湖面都结冰，不过通常3月份就解冻了。

examples.english: The snow had started to thaw, and there was a faint scent of spring in the air.
examples.chinese: 积雪开始融化，空气中有了一丝春天的气息。

examples.english: He melts down coins to make into earrings and ornaments.
examples.chinese: 他把硬币熔化掉，做成耳环和装饰品。

examples.english: Most of the brass in the church has been melted down and sold.
examples.chinese: 教堂里的黄铜大部分都被熔下来卖掉了。

examples.english: We collected all the old candles and melted them down to make one big candle.
examples.chinese: 我们把所有的旧蜡烛都收集起来熔化掉，制成一根大蜡烛。

examples.english: You can watch craftsmen make beautiful vases out of molten glass.
examples.chinese: 你可以看到工匠用玻璃熔液制造出精美的花瓶。

examples.english: The town was buried under a river of molten lava.
examples.chinese: 小镇被掩埋在熔岩的巨流之下。

examples.english: Castings are made by pouring molten metal into a mould and allowing it to solidify.
examples.chinese: 金属熔液注入模具后，让它凝固，就制成了铸件。

examples.english: Steam from the shower condensed on the cold bathroom mirror.
examples.chinese: 淋浴产生的水蒸气在冰凉的浴室镜子上凝成小水珠。

examples.english: During cold nights, air condenses on the grass to form dew.
examples.chinese: 在寒冷的夜晚，空气在草地上凝结成露水。

examples.english: The gaseous metal is put in a closed container and cooled so that it condenses into liquid zinc.
examples.chinese: 气态金属被置于一个密封容器里冷却，让它凝成液态锌。

examples.english: soluble aspirin
examples.chinese: 可溶性阿司匹林

examples.english: The use of soluble chemical fertilizers is banned, as they seep into rivers and pollute the water supply.
examples.chinese: 可溶性化肥是禁用的，因为它们会渗入河流污染水源。

examples.english: There are two sorts of vitamins: some are soluble in fat, and some soluble in water.
examples.chinese: 维生素有两类，一类是可溶于脂肪的，一类是可溶于水的。

examples.english: Plants take up water-soluble minerals through their roots.
examples.chinese: 植物通过根部吸收水溶性矿物质。

examples.english: When the sauce is just starting to thicken, pour it over the meat.
examples.chinese: 酱汁开始变稠的时候，把它浇到肉上。

examples.english: Now boil the mixture until it thickens.
examples.chinese: 接下来把混合调料煮沸，直到它变稠。

examples.english: As the temperature goes down, the oil in the engine gets thicker.
examples.chinese: 随着气温下降，发动机里的油也凝结起来了。

examples.english: Leave the jam in a cool place to set.
examples.chinese: 把果酱拿到阴凉的地方凝固。

examples.english: It's best to pour your yoghurt into small containers before it sets.
examples.chinese: 最好在酸奶凝固之前倒在较小的容器里。

examples.english: Has the glue set yet?
examples.chinese: 胶水凝固了吗？

examples.english: Blood had clotted on the cuts on his back and on his arms.
examples.chinese: 他背上和手臂上伤口的血已经凝结。

examples.english: Some types of snake venom prevent blood from clotting.
examples.chinese: 有些蛇的毒液会阻止血液凝结。

examples.english: Josie picked up a plate of congealed egg and beans, and scraped it into the bin.
examples.chinese: 乔西拿起一盘结在一起的鸡蛋烧豆子，把它倒入了垃圾桶。

centers.english: things that you throw away because you do not want them

examples.english: The dustmen collect the rubbish on Wednesdays.
examples.chinese: 垃圾工人逢星期三来收垃圾。

examples.english: There was rubbish and broken glass all over the grass.
examples.chinese: 草地上到处是垃圾和碎玻璃。

examples.english: Don't forget to put the rubbish out before you go to bed.
examples.chinese: 上床睡觉前别忘了把垃圾拿出去放进垃圾筒。

examples.english: Two stolen paintings have been found dumped in a rubbish bin.
examples.chinese: 两幅被盗的画被发现扔在垃圾箱内。

examples.english: I rescued this table from a rubbish dump.
examples.chinese: 这张桌子我是从垃圾场里捡来的。

examples.english: There were piles of trash in the backyard.
examples.chinese: 后院有成堆的垃圾。

examples.english: I do all the chores, from picking up the groceries to taking out the garbage.
examples.chinese: 从买食品杂货到把垃圾拿出去，所有的家庭杂活都是我做的。

examples.english: Will someone please empty this trash can!
examples.chinese: 谁去把这个垃圾筒倒一倒好吗？

examples.english: Ken drives a garbage truck for a living.
examples.chinese: 肯以开垃圾车为生。

examples.english: There are two bins. One is for glass and one is for waste paper.
examples.chinese: 有两个垃圾筒。一个放玻璃，一个放废纸。

examples.english: She crumpled the letter up and put it in the waste paper basket.
examples.chinese: 她把信揉成一团扔进了废纸篓。

examples.english: These streets are full of litter.
examples.chinese: 这些街道上满是废弃物。

examples.english: You can be fined £100 for dropping litter.
examples.chinese: 乱扔废物可被罚款100英镑。

examples.english: I am tired of picking up litter thrown by other people.
examples.chinese: 我已厌了捡别人丢的垃圾了。

examples.english: a picnic area with large wooden tables and litter bins
examples.chinese: 设有大木桌和废物箱的野餐区

examples.english: Heaps of decaying refuse littered every street.
examples.chinese: 每条街上都有成堆的腐烂的垃圾。

examples.english: Refuse collection has been seriously affected by the strike.
examples.chinese: 垃圾收集工作受到了罢工的严重影响。

examples.english: We are gradually developing safer and more effective methods of refuse disposal.
examples.chinese: 我们在慢慢地发展更为安全有效的垃圾处理方法。

examples.english: facilities for recycling household refuse
examples.chinese: 回收利用家庭垃圾的设施

examples.english: Too much waste has been dumped into the North Sea.
examples.chinese: 太多的废料被倾倒到北海之中。

examples.english: Industrial waste had leaked into the water supply.
examples.chinese: 工业废料已经渗入了水源中。

examples.english: The government has announced a ban on all imports of toxic waste from abroad.
examples.chinese: 政府已宣布禁止从国外进口有毒废料。

examples.english: The costs of waste disposal are rising all the time.
examples.chinese: 处理废料的成本在不断上升。

examples.english: I wasted 40 minutes waiting for a bus this morning.
examples.chinese: 今天早上我浪费了40分钟等公共汽车。

examples.english: Don't leave the light on - you're wasting electricity.
examples.chinese: 别让灯一直开着——浪费电。

examples.english: The school kitchen wastes an awful lot of food.
examples.chinese: 学校食堂浪费大量食物。

examples.english: Bill wastes all his money on beer and cigarettes.
examples.chinese: 比尔把钱都浪费在啤酒和香烟上。

examples.english: Let's not waste any more time on this.
examples.chinese: 我们不要在这件事上再浪费时间了。

examples.english: I felt as if my education had been wasted when I couldn't get a job.
examples.chinese: 我找不到工作，觉得我受的教育都浪费了。

examples.english: I'm sorry, you've had a wasted trip. Mr Newton isn't here at the moment.
examples.chinese: 对不起，你白跑了一趟，牛顿先生这会儿不在。

examples.english: She thought back over the past four years - four wasted years married to a man who almost destroyed her.
examples.chinese: 她回顾过去的四年——嫁了个几乎毁掉她的男人，浪费了四年的光阴。

examples.english: The government could have dealt with the problem there and then. It was a wasted opportunity.
examples.chinese: 政府本来可以立即处理这个问题，但机会浪费了。

examples.english: Local produce often goes to waste because people prefer to buy imported food.
examples.chinese: 当地的农产品常常被浪费掉，因为人们喜欢购买进口食品。

examples.english: If no one else wants this, I'll eat it -- I hate to see good food go to waste.
examples.chinese: 要是没人想要的话，我来吃一我不喜欢看到好好的食物被浪费掉。

examples.english: We can't let all our hard work go to waste.
examples.chinese: 我们不能让努力白费。

examples.english: His family felt he had squandered his musical talent.
examples.chinese: 他的家人认为他浪费了自己的音乐天赋。

examples.english: England squandered a golden opportunity to score, seconds before the final whistle.
examples.chinese: 终场哨声吹响前的几秒，英格兰队浪费了一次绝佳的进球机会。

examples.english: Howard was a terrible gambler, and had squandered away the family fortune.
examples.chinese: 霍华德是个大赌棍，把全部家产都挥霍掉了。

examples.english: So many students seem to fritter away their time at college.
examples.chinese: 那么多学生似乎虚度了大学时光。

examples.english: Michelle had frittered her inheritance away on extravagant parties and fancy clothes.
examples.chinese: 米歇尔把继承的遗产都浪费在豪华聚会和华美服饰上。

examples.english: She had dissipated her fortune by the time she was twenty-five.
examples.chinese: 她25岁时已经把她的财产挥霍掉了。

examples.english: Buying nice clothes for you was just money down the drain. All you ever wear are jeans and T-shirts.
examples.chinese: 给你买漂亮的衣服只是白白浪费金钱。你向来只穿牛仔裤和T恤衫。

examples.english: The government is throwing tax payers’ money down the drain.
examples.chinese: 政府在白白浪费纳税人的钱。

centers.english: something that wastes time, money etc

examples.english: a pointless war that was a terrible waste of human life
examples.chinese: 糟蹋生命的一场无意义的战争

examples.english: That class was a complete waste of time - I didn't learn anything.
examples.chinese: 那堂课完全是浪费时间—我什么都没学到。

examples.english: My parents think going to football games is a waste of money.
examples.chinese: 我的父母认为看足球赛是浪费金钱。

examples.english: Many people see the new £60 million building as wasteful and extravagant.
examples.chinese: 许多人认为那幢耗资六千万英镑的新大楼是铺张浪费。

examples.english: wasteful packaging
examples.chinese: 浪费的包装

examples.english: an inefficient heating system
examples.chinese: 效果差的暖气系统

examples.english: Local government in the area is seen as being corrupt and inefficient.
examples.chinese: 人们认为这个地区的地方政府腐败且效率低。

examples.english: The factory is inefficient, and its working practices and machinery dated.
examples.chinese: 这家工厂效率低，工作制度和机器都过时了。

centers.english: to get rid of something that you do not want

examples.english: Let's get rid of some of these old books.
examples.chinese: 我们把这些旧书丢掉一些吧。

examples.english: I hate these chairs. I wish we could get rid of them.
examples.chinese: 我不喜欢这些椅子，但愿我们能把它们处理掉。

examples.english: We finally got rid of all that old junk we had stored in the basement.
examples.chinese: 我们终于把放在地下室里的所有旧垃圾都扔掉了。

examples.english: Don't throw away these boxes - I might want to use them later.
examples.chinese: 不要扔掉这些盒子—说不定我以后用得着。

examples.english: Oh, no. I think I've accidentally thrown the invitation away.
examples.chinese: 噢，不好，我想我不小心把请柬扔掉了。

examples.english: My wife made me throw out my old tennis shoes.
examples.chinese: 我妻子要我把我的旧网球鞋扔掉。

examples.english: Can I throw these newspapers out, or are you still reading them?
examples.chinese: 我可以扔了这些报纸吗，还是你还要看?

examples.english: The company has been charged with illegally disposing of hazardous wastes.
examples.chinese: 该公司因为违法处置有害垃圾遭到了起诉。

examples.english: Police are still puzzled as to how he managed to dispose of his victim's body.
examples.chinese: 警方仍然不明白他是如何处理被害人尸体的。

examples.english: We need new legislation to ensure the safe disposal of nuclear waste.
examples.chinese: 我们需要新的法规来保证核废料的安全处置。

examples.english: I can't wait to get shot of this old car.
examples.chinese: 我迫不及待地想把这辆旧车扔掉。

examples.english: Everybody's in a rush to get shot of their shares in the company.
examples.chinese: 人人都急着抛掉该公司的股票。

expressions.text: something will have to go/ something has got to go

examples.english: I can't stand this carpet. I'm sorry Larry, it'll have to go.
examples.chinese: 我受不了这块地毯了。对不起，拉里，必须扔掉它。

centers.english: to get rid of a leader, someone in authority etc
centers.chinese: 推翻领导人、当权的人等

examples.english: He's a terrible manager -- it's about time they got rid of him.
examples.chinese: 他是个糟糕的经理—他们该是时候把他赶走了。

examples.english: Local people desperately want to get rid of US troops on the island.
examples.chinese: 当地人民不顾一切地想赶走岛上的美国驻军。

examples.english: The trustees of the University are considering getting rid of him.
examples.chinese: 大学理事会的成员在考虑罢免他。

examples.english: President Kassem was overthrown and murdered in 1963.
examples.chinese: 1963年卡塞姆总统被推翻了政权并遭到杀害。

examples.english: The dictatorship was overthrown after a year of fighting, in which thousands of people were killed.
examples.chinese: 经过一年的斗争，独裁统治被推翻了，有好几千人失去了生命。

examples.english: He came to power after the overthrow of Haile Selassie.
examples.chinese: 他在海尔·塞拉西被推翻之后上台。

examples.english: Nusabe was ousted in a coup late last year.
examples.chinese: 努萨比在去年年底的政变中被赶下台。

examples.english: Reformers have expressed concern that he could be ousted by hard-liners opposed to his reforms.
examples.chinese: 改革派人士担心他会被反对他改革的强硬派赶下台。

examples.english: Supporters of the ousted dictator have been rounded up and jailed.
examples.chinese: 支持已被罢黜的独裁者的人被逮起来投进了监狱。

examples.english: He was deposed after more than 18 years in power.
examples.chinese: 他当政超过了18年以后遭到了罢免。

examples.english: Moreau was deposed in a military coup and fled to the US.
examples.chinese: 莫罗在一次军事政变中遭到罢免，逃到了美国。

examples.english: The deposed king will set up a government in exile.
examples.chinese: 这位被废黜的国王将成立流亡政府。

centers.english: to get rid of someone because you do not like or need them any more
centers.chinese: 因不喜欢或不再需要而除掉某人

examples.english: New police chief Brody promised to get rid of the city's drug dealers.
examples.chinese: 新任警察局长布罗迪承诺要扫荡这个城市里的毒贩。

examples.english: The company announced that it will get rid of another 500 workers by the end of the year.
examples.chinese: 公司宣布在年底前将再裁减500名工人。

examples.english: One of the administration's first tasks will be to get rid of many of the officials appointed by the previous president.
examples.chinese: 政府的首要任务之一就是要清除前总统任命的许多官员。

examples.english: Many radicals were purged from the party in the early seventies.
examples.chinese: 70年代初，许多激进分子被清除出党。

examples.english: In the North, Sung systematically purged those whom he considered a threat.
examples.chinese: 在北方，宋彻底铲除了他认为有威胁的人。

examples.english: Stalin's purges of the 1930s
examples.chinese: 20世纪30年代斯大林的大清洗运动

examples.english: We do have procedures in place to weed out individuals who are corrupt.
examples.chinese: 我们确有相应的程序清除腐败的人员。

examples.english: The report claimed that there were at least 20,000 inefficient teachers that needed to be weeded out.
examples.chinese: 报告中称，至少有两万名不称职的教师需要淘汰。

examples.english: The Ministry of Health is continuing its efforts to root out incompetent doctors.
examples.chinese: 卫生部继续努力清除不称职的医生。〔

examples.english: At that time, a secret branch of the National Police was involved in rooting out dissidents.
examples.chinese: 那个时候，国民警察的一个秘密分支参与了铲除持不同政见者的行动。

expressions.text: somebody will have to go/ somebody has (got) to go

examples.english: It's been decided. Murrow will have to go.
examples.chinese: 已经决定了，默罗必须走。

examples.english: ‘Gates has done nothing but divide this city. He has got to go,’ said one of the protesters.
examples.chinese: “盖茨所做的只是让这个城市分裂，他必须下台。”其中一名抗议者说道。

examples.english: I think the guy's a jerk. I'm glad Debbie dumped him.
examples.chinese: 我觉得那家伙是个蠢人，我很高兴黛比甩了他。

examples.english: ‘Why did he dump her?’ ‘He met somebody else.’
examples.chinese: “他为什么抛弃她？”“他认识别人了。”

centers.english: to get rid of something that is causing problems
centers.chinese: 除掉造成问题的某事物

examples.english: I can't seem to get rid of this cold.
examples.chinese: 我这感冒似乎好不了。

examples.english: We've cleaned the carpet twice, but still can't get rid of the smell.
examples.chinese: 我们已经洗过地毯两次了，可还是除不了这气味。

examples.english: Weedaway is a safe and natural way to get rid of weeds coming up in the garden.
examples.chinese: “除草净”是清除园内杂草的一种安全、天然的方法。

examples.english: The unpopular tax was finally abolished some ten years ago.
examples.chinese: 这个不得人心的税种终于在十来年之前被废除了。

examples.english: He served over 27 years in prison for fighting to abolish white-only rule.
examples.chinese: 他为了废除白人专权统治而斗争，结果在狱中度过了超过27年。

examples.english: The group is working toward the abolition of the death penalty.
examples.chinese: 这个团体在为废除死刑而努力。

examples.english: Plans to build a new airport have been scrapped because of lack of funding.
examples.chinese: 因为缺乏资金，修建新机场的计划已经搁置了。

examples.english: The president's proposal to scrap the program has angered many members of Congress.
examples.chinese: 总统放弃这个计划的提议激怒了许多国会议员。

examples.english: Investors ditched stocks that were performing badly.
examples.chinese: 投资者抛售了业绩不良的股票。

examples.english: Brumfeld apparently ditched the car near Texarkana and fled into the woods.
examples.chinese: 布拉姆菲尔德显然是在特克萨卡纳湖附近弃车，然后逃进了树林。

examples.english: San José State University is doing away with its business school and department of journalism.
examples.chinese: 圣何塞州立大学将要撤去商学院和新闻系。

examples.english: All countries in the region should commit themselves to doing away with weapons of mass destruction.
examples.chinese: 这个地区内所有的国家都应该作出承诺，销毁大规模杀伤性武器。

examples.english: The disease has been eradicated from the Western world through the use of vaccines.
examples.chinese: 这种疾病在西方国家已经通过使用疫苗根除了。

examples.english: Their aim is to eradicate child poverty in the country within 10 years.
examples.chinese: 他们的目标是要在十年之内消灭本国的儿童贫困现象。

examples.english: The eradication of the beetle has led to a five-fold increase in crop yields.
examples.chinese: 消灭甲虫使庄稼收成增加到五倍。

examples.english: Traffic police intend to eliminate congestion caused by illegally parked vehicles.
examples.chinese: 交通警察部门想要消除违章停车造成的交通拥挤现象。

examples.english: Advances in medical science have eliminated the need for many patients to spend long periods of time in hospital.
examples.chinese: 医学的进步为许多病人排除了长期住院的需要。

examples.english: The new president has promised to root out high level corruption.
examples.chinese: 新总统承诺要根绝高层的腐败行为。

examples.english: Wherever we find waste and incompetence we will root it out.
examples.chinese: 不管哪里发现有浪费和不能胜任的情况，我们都要加以杜绝。

centers.english: to get rid of harmful ideas or influences
centers.chinese: 消除有害的想法或影响

expressions.gram: transitive phrasal verb not usually in passive

examples.english: Scientists hope to one day rid the world of this terrible disease.
examples.chinese: 科学家希望有一天能使这种可怕的疾病从世界上消失。

examples.english: I can't seem to rid my mind of what happened on the day of the accident.
examples.chinese: 我似乎没法摆脱出事那天所发生的事情。

examples.english: Neighbourhood Watch schemes have succeeded in virtually freeing the area of crime.
examples.chinese: 邻里守望计划实际上已消灭了该地区的犯罪现象。

examples.english: Aid organisations are trying to free the country of the ravages of two decades of civil war.
examples.chinese: 救援组织正试图把该国从二十年内战的蹂躏中解救出来。

examples.english: The Central Bank attempted to dispel rumours of a possible financial crisis.
examples.chinese: 中央银行试图澄清可能会爆发金融危机的谣言。

examples.english: In an interview Monday, the Foreign Affairs Secretary tried to dispel doubts about his handling of the crisis.
examples.chinese: 在星期一的一次采访中，外务部长试图消除人们对他危机处理能力的怀疑。

centers.english: to have got rid of something or somebody

examples.english: At first I was glad to be rid of the extra work, but then I realized how much money I was losing.
examples.chinese: 起初我很高兴摆脱了这些额外的工作，但后来我才发现损失了不少钱。

examples.english: The sooner we're rid of this government the better.
examples.chinese: 这个政府我们越早推翻越好。

examples.english: You shouldn't even think about buying a new car until you're rid of your current debts.
examples.chinese: 在还清现在这些债务之前，买新车的事你想都不该想。

expressions.text: be glad/happy to see the back of

examples.english: I'll be glad to see the back of this project.
examples.chinese: 我将很高兴看到这个项目结束。

examples.english: We will be glad to see the back of Williams, that's for sure.
examples.chinese: 看到威廉斯离去，我们会很高兴，那是肯定的。

centers.english: to put something over, on, or around something else
centers.chinese: 用某物覆盖或包裹另一物

examples.english: Prepare the salad, and cover it until it's time to serve.
examples.chinese: 做好沙拉，端上桌之前一直要盖好盖子。

examples.english: She covered her face with her hands and ran upstairs.
examples.chinese: 她双手捂着脸跑上楼去。

examples.english: She always wears a lot of make-up to cover up her spots.
examples.chinese: 她总是在脸上涂上厚厚的脂粉以遮盖雀斑。

examples.english: They used special paint to cover up the cracks in the wall.
examples.chinese: 他们用特制的涂料来遮盖墙上的裂缝。

examples.english: The stewardess gave him a blanket to put over his legs.
examples.chinese: 女乘务员递给他一条毯子盖在腿上。

examples.english: Before you paint the walls, put some old sheets over the furniture.
examples.chinese: 刷墙之前用旧床单盖住家具。

examples.english: Have you wrapped up all your Christmas presents yet?
examples.chinese: 你把所有的圣诞礼物都包好了吗?

examples.english: Ruth caught a sea bass and wrapped it up in paper to bring home to her cat.
examples.chinese: 露丝钓了一条海鲈，用纸包好，准备带回家喂猫。

examples.english: He wrapped the uneaten half of his sandwich in foil and put it in the refrigerator.
examples.chinese: 他将半块没吃完的三明治用锡纸包好，放进冰箱。

examples.english: A special machine coats the nuts with chocolate.
examples.chinese: 一种特殊机器在果仁的表面涂上巧克力。

centers.english: to be on top of something

examples.english: Posters of Elvis covered practically the whole wall.
examples.chinese: 艾尔维斯的海报几乎把整面墙都贴满了。

examples.english: Tropical rain forests cover 7 percent of the world's surface.
examples.chinese: 热带雨林覆盖了全球7%的表面积。

examples.english: As you can see from the weather map, huge rain clouds are completely covering the South East.
examples.chinese: 从气象图上可见，大片降雨云团完全覆盖了东南部。

examples.english: He was about fifty, with strands of fair hair covering a receding hair line.
examples.chinese: 他大约50岁，前额已经开始变秃，几缕金色的头发盖在上面。

examples.english: The mist and rain enveloped the forest so that we could only see the nearest trees.
examples.chinese: 整座森林笼罩在雨雾中，我们只能看见身边的树木。

examples.english: At sunset, darkness enveloped the town.
examples.chinese: 太阳落山了，黑暗吞噬了整个镇。

examples.english: The ground was covered with snow.
examples.chinese: 地上全是积雪。

examples.english: Look at your clothes! They're covered in mud.
examples.chinese: 瞧瞧你的衣服！上面全是泥。

examples.english: His face was covered by a thick black beard with tiny flecks of gray in it.
examples.chinese: 他点点黑斑的脸上全是浓密的黑胡须。

examples.english: Serve the chicken with new potatoes coated in butter.
examples.chinese: 鸡肉和涂了黄油的新马铃薯就着吃。

examples.english: He took off his gloves, which were deeply encrusted with dirt.
examples.chinese: 他脱下手套，上面沾了厚厚一层污垢。

examples.english: Evan reached into the pocket of his mud-encrusted jacket and drew out a map.
examples.chinese: 埃文将手伸进沾满泥的外套的口袋里，拿出一张地图。

examples.english: He looked at his garden tools, old and plastered with mud.
examples.chinese: 他看着自己的园艺工具，既破旧，上面又沾着厚厚的泥。

examples.english: Her face was plastered in make-up.
examples.chinese: 她的脸上涂着厚厚的化妆品。

examples.english: The children were caked in mud from head to toe.
examples.chinese: 孩子们从头到脚全是泥。

examples.english: When the police found him, his shoes were missing and his hands were caked with dried blood.
examples.chinese: 警方发现他时，他的鞋子不见了，手上全是干了的血迹。

examples.english: I looked back, but the shore was shrouded in mist.
examples.chinese: 我向后看去，但是岸上被雾气笼罩着。

centers.english: something that is used to cover something else
centers.chinese: 用于覆盖其他东西的物品

examples.english: It's a good idea to buy a cover for your computer keyboard.
examples.chinese: 给电脑键盘买个套子，这个主意不错。

examples.english: She took the card out of its plastic cover.
examples.chinese: 她从塑料护套中拿出了卡。

examples.english: There were old record covers scattered all over the floor.
examples.chinese: 地板上到处散放着旧的唱片封套。

examples.english: Patrick threw back the covers and hopped out of bed.
examples.chinese: 帕特里克将毯子往后一扔便跳下了床。

examples.english: The insect's shell gives it a tough protective covering.
examples.chinese: 那种昆虫的壳给了它结实的保护层。

examples.english: The prison cells have no electricity and no floor coverings.
examples.chinese: 牢房里没有电，地上光秃秃的。

examples.english: a saucepan lid
examples.chinese: 一个平底锅盖

examples.english: Annie, do you know where the lid for the garbage can is?
examples.chinese: 安妮，垃圾箱盖在哪里？

examples.english: Sam lifted the lid of his desk and took out a calculator.
examples.chinese: 萨姆掀起课桌盖板，拿出一台计算器。

examples.english: Why don't you ever put the top back on the toothpaste?
examples.chinese: 你为什么总是不把牙膏的盖子盖回去?

examples.english: I can't get the top off this bottle.
examples.chinese: 我拧不开这只瓶盖。

examples.english: Remove the gas cap by turning it twice to the left and then back to the right.
examples.chinese: 把油箱盖向左转两下，然后向右转回，就能打开了。

examples.english: chewing-gum wrappers
examples.chinese: 口香糖的包装纸

examples.english: The empty stadium was littered with burger wrappers and empty cans.
examples.chinese: 空荡荡的体育场里乱扔着汉堡包装纸和空罐子。

examples.english: He undid the ribbons and tore at the paper wrapping.
examples.chinese: 他解开缎带并撕开包装纸。

examples.english: Torn Christmas wrapping littered the floor.
examples.chinese: 撕开的圣诞礼物包装纸乱丢在地上。

centers.english: a thin flat layer that covers a surface
centers.chinese: 覆盖表面的薄薄的一层东西

examples.english: A layer of dust covered everything in the room.
examples.chinese: 房间里的所有东西都蒙了一层灰。

examples.english: Sprinkle a layer of soil over the seeds.
examples.chinese: 在种子上撒一层土。

examples.english: She wiped away the light film of sweat that had formed on her upper lip.
examples.chinese: 她擦去上唇上薄薄的一层汗。

examples.english: Cassette tapes have a magnetic oxide coating.
examples.chinese: 盒式磁带上有一种磁性氧化物涂层。

examples.english: ice-cream with a thick coating of chocolate
examples.chinese: 外面有厚厚一层巧克力的冰淇淋

examples.english: Our tour party included several young families.
examples.chinese: 我们的旅行队包括几个年轻家庭。

examples.english: Symptoms of the disease include tiredness and loss of memory.
examples.chinese: 该疾病的症状包括疲倦和记忆丧失。

examples.english: Today's programme will include a workshop on language learning games.
examples.chinese: 今天的节目将包括一个语言学习游戏研讨会。

examples.english: The film contains some very unpleasant scenes of violence.
examples.chinese: 这部电影中有一些很可怕的暴力镜头。

examples.english: Her report contained some interesting suggestions.
examples.chinese: 她的报告中有一些很有趣的建议。

examples.english: All computer manuals should contain a list giving addresses of suppliers.
examples.chinese: 所有的电脑手册都应包括一张清单，列出供应商的地址。

examples.english: The prime minister was among the 300 people who attended the funeral.
examples.chinese: 在出席葬礼的300人中有首相。

examples.english: Among the collection of photographs are two taken in Hamburg in 1911.
examples.chinese: 照片集中有两张摄于1911年的汉堡。

examples.english: There were about twenty spectators, among whom were Bill, Maria and myself.
examples.chinese: 大约有二十个观众，包括比尔、玛丽亚和我。

examples.english: Prices range from $10 to $500,000.
examples.chinese: 价格从10美元到50万美元不等。

examples.english: Levels of disability may range from very slight hearing problems to total deafness.
examples.chinese: 残疾程度包括从非常轻微的听力障碍到听力完全丧失不等。

centers.english: to include more than one subject, period etc
centers.chinese: 包含多于一个题目、时期等

examples.english: His book on European history covers the period from 1914 to 2001.
examples.chinese: 他那本欧洲历史书涉及1914年到2001年这一时期。

examples.english: The course lasts two years and covers seven basic subjects.
examples.chinese: 这一课程为时两年，内容涉及七门基本学科。

expressions.text: cover a wide range/variety of something

examples.english: The term RSI - repetitive strain injury - covers a wide variety of painful hand and arm conditions.
examples.chinese: 重复性紧张损伤〔RSI〕一词包括各种类型的手掌和手臂疼痛症状。

examples.english: The Hindu religion encompasses many widely differing forms of worship.
examples.chinese: 印度教中包括有许多截然不同的崇拜形式。

examples.english: It was a fruitful discussion which encompassed several different viewpoints.
examples.chinese: 那是一次富有成效的讨论，包括了几个不同的观点。

examples.english: The word "culture' embraces both artistic and sociological aspects of a society.
examples.chinese: “文化”一词的含义既包括一个社会的艺术层面，也包括其社会层面。

examples.english: The category "kinsmen' also embraces grandparents and grandchildren.
examples.chinese: “亲属”的范围还包括祖辈和孙辈。

examples.english: "Heimat' is a vivid social drama spanning sixty years in the life of one small village.
examples.chinese: 《故乡》是一部生动的社会剧，涵盖了一座小村庄60年间的生活。

examples.english: In a career spanning four decades, Brewster had many legal triumphs.
examples.chinese: 布鲁斯特在其40年的职业生涯中赢得过许多次法律上的胜利。

examples.english: The price of the computer includes £500 worth of free software.
examples.chinese: 这台电脑的价格包含500英镑的免费软件。

examples.english: The toy has flashing lights and a siren noise, but batteries are not included.
examples.chinese: 这个玩具包含有闪光灯和警报器，但不包括电池。

examples.english: You don't have to pay for your flights - they're included in the price of your holiday.
examples.chinese: 你不必付机票钱，票款已含在度假的费用中。

examples.english: The luxury model comes with a matching metal carrying case.
examples.chinese: 豪华型附有配套的金属提箱。

examples.english: Most new cars now come with a driver's airbag as standard.
examples.chinese: 现在大部分新汽车都配有一个驾驶员气囊作为标准配备。

examples.english: The inclusive cost of the car, complete with tax and insurance, is £9,800.
examples.chinese: 这部车的总价，包括税款和保险费，是9，800英镑。

examples.english: The cost of the flights, accommodation and car rental is two thousand dollars all-inclusive.
examples.chinese: 机票、住宿和租车费共计2,000美元。

examples.english: At a cost of $25 per person per night inclusive, bed and breakfast accommodation is fairly cheap.
examples.chinese: 每人每晚25美元的住宿加早餐费用是相当便宜的。

examples.english: There'll be eighteen people at the party, including you and me.
examples.chinese: 包括你和我在内，这个聚会将有18个人参加。

examples.english: Including weekends, there are only twelve more shopping days until Christmas.
examples.chinese: 包括周末，一共只剩下12天去买圣诞礼物。

examples.english: Not including cassettes, he has eight thousand albums in his collection.
examples.chinese: 不算磁带，他共集有8,000张唱片。

examples.english: Counting the one I've just bought, I now have three hundred different sets of playing cards.
examples.chinese: 把我刚买的一套算在内，我现在有300套不同的纸牌。

examples.english: Counting Singapore, where we stopped to refuel, we've visited eleven countries in three weeks.
examples.chinese: 把我们停下来加油的新加坡算在内，我们在3周内已游览了11个国家。

examples.english: With tax, the hotel bill came to four hundred dollars.
examples.chinese: 连同税款，旅馆账单总共是400美元。

examples.english: With Peter and his mother, there'll be six for lunch tomorrow.
examples.chinese: 把彼得和他母亲算在内，明天有六个人吃午饭。

examples.english: ‘Our rooms cost $30 a night.’ ‘Is that with breakfast?’
examples.chinese: “我们的房间30美元一晚。”“这包括早餐吗？

expressions.text: April to June inclusive/15 to 20 inclusive etc

examples.english: The library will be closed from April to June inclusive.
examples.chinese: 图书馆将从4月到6月闭馆。

examples.english: Children aged 9 to 16 inclusive are welcome to enrol on the course.
examples.chinese: 欢迎9到16岁的儿童参加该课程。

examples.english: We're all going to the game, Betty included!
examples.chinese: 我们都要去看比赛，包括贝蒂！

examples.english: Everyone, the chairman included, eats in the staff restaurant.
examples.chinese: 每一个人，包括主席在内，都在职工餐厅用餐。

centers.english: to deliberately include something or someone

examples.english: Even if you include the cost of food, it's still a cheap vacation.
examples.chinese: 即使把吃的花费算在内，这次度假仍是很便宜的。

examples.english: The team is looking strong, especially now that they have included Roscoe.
examples.chinese: 这支队看起来很强，尤其是现在他们把罗斯科也请来了。

examples.english: I have included two jazz numbers in my selection.
examples.chinese: 我把两支爵士乐选入了专辑中。

examples.english: Watson's inclusion in the US athletics team has caused much controversy.
examples.chinese: 沃森被选入美国田径队，这引起了很大争论。

examples.english: Do you think you can work in a reference to our project?
examples.chinese: 你觉得你能提及一下我们的计划吗？

examples.english: Boorman was once a director able to work his obsessions into movies like ‘Point Blank’ and ‘Deliverance’.
examples.chinese: 布尔曼曾经是个能够把自己念念不忘的情感融入《步步惊魂》和《激流四勇士》等影片中去的导演。

examples.english: the sort of facilities currently being worked into the latest software releases
examples.chinese: 近来加到新推出的软件中的那种功能

examples.english: We have incorporated a users’ guide with the software.
examples.chinese: 我们已在该软件中加了使用指南。

examples.english: The architect has incorporated Egyptian and Renaissance themes in the building's design.
examples.chinese: 建筑师在这幢大楼的设计中吸收了埃及和文艺复兴时期的主题。

centers.english: to not include someone or something
centers.chinese: 故意不包括某人或某物

examples.english: Fans were shocked that Giggs had been left out of the team.
examples.chinese: 吉格斯被排除在队伍之外让球迷很吃惊。

examples.english: He briefly told us what had happened, leaving out the more gruesome details.
examples.chinese: 他简单地对我们讲了发生的事，略去了更为可怕的细节。

examples.english: I went through a list of people to be thanked, and hoped I hadn't left anyone out.
examples.chinese: 我仔细看了要感谢的人的名单，希望没把谁遗漏了。

examples.english: The new law protects most workers, but excludes those on part-time contracts.
examples.chinese: 新法律保护了大多数工人，但把那些签有兼职合同的工人排除在外。

examples.english: She felt they were deliberately excluding her from their plans.
examples.chinese: 她感到他们是故意将她排除在计划之外的。

examples.english: Please do not omit any details, however trivial they may seem.
examples.chinese: 请勿遗漏任何细节，不管看起来多么无关紧要。

examples.english: Sara's name had been omitted from the list of employees.
examples.chinese: 萨拉的名字被从员工名单上删除了。

examples.english: You missed out several important facts.
examples.chinese: 你遗漏了几个重要事实。

examples.english: Those are the people I'm inviting. Did I miss anyone out?
examples.chinese: 我要邀请这些人，有没有把谁漏了？

examples.english: I don't think this article will be of interest to our readers. Let's drop it.
examples.chinese: 我认为这篇文章不会令读者感兴趣。我们把它删去吧。

examples.english: The coach just announced that Henri will be dropped from the team.
examples.chinese: 教练刚宣布了亨利将被除名。

centers.english: when a number, total, or price does not include something
centers.chinese: 数目、总数或价格中不包括某物

examples.english: The rent is £80 a week, exclusive of bills.
examples.chinese: 租金每周80英镑，不包括水电等。

examples.english: The fully fitted kitchen costs $5,000, exclusive of tax.
examples.chinese: 厨房的全套设备的价格为5,000美元，不包括税款。

examples.english: English excepted, Peter has made good progress in all his subjects this term.
examples.chinese: 除了英语以外，彼得这学期在所有科目上都取得了长足的进步。

examples.english: Gardening excepted, she does very little in the way of good regular exercise.
examples.chinese: 除了园艺，她很少参加有益的定期体育活动。

examples.english: He opened the bag, which contained a razor, soap, and a towel.
examples.chinese: 他打开包，里面有一把剃须刀、肥皂和一条毛巾。

examples.english: Some paints contain lead, which can be poisonous.
examples.chinese: 有些颜料含铅，有毒性。

examples.english: Cigarettes containing less than 0.8 mg can be classified as ‘light’.
examples.chinese: 含有不足0.8毫克〔焦油〕的香烟可归为“淡味”一类。

examples.english: The drawer contained various odds and ends.
examples.chinese: 那个抽屉里装有各种零零碎碎的东西。

examples.english: a pewter box containing Spanish coins from the 1540s
examples.chinese: 一个装有16世纪40年代西班牙硬币的白镴盒子

examples.english: Does this coffee have sugar in it?
examples.chinese: 这杯咖啡加糖了吗？

examples.english: Carol can't eat anything that has nuts in it.
examples.chinese: 卡罗尔不吃含有坚果的东西。

examples.english: The hallway had a huge grandfather clock in it.
examples.chinese: 门厅里有一座巨型的老式落地钟。

centers.english: to be able to contain a particular amount

examples.english: This jug holds about two litres.
examples.chinese: 那个壶容量约两升。

examples.english: The lecture theatre can hold up to 200 students.
examples.chinese: 阶梯教室最多可容纳200名学生。

examples.english: A blank data disk can hold about 360,000 characters.
examples.chinese: 一张空白的数据盘可容纳约36万个字符。

expressions.gram: transitive verb not in progressive or passive

examples.english: The car can only take five people.
examples.chinese: 那辆车只能坐五个人。

examples.english: The bookshelves won't take any more books.
examples.chinese: 那些书架再也摆不下书了。

examples.english: The helicopters can carry eight soldiers each.
examples.chinese: 每架直升机可载八名士兵。

examples.english: The ferry can carry 300 passengers, plus 100 vehicles.
examples.chinese: 渡船可载300名乘客，外加100辆车。

examples.english: Everyone's going except Donald.
examples.chinese: 除了唐纳德，每个人都去。

examples.english: The house was silent except for a clock chiming in the living room.
examples.chinese: 屋子里静悄悄的，只有客厅里钟声在响。

examples.english: Except for a small part in an obscure movie years ago, Depardieu had never before acted in an English-language picture.
examples.chinese: 除了几年之前在一部没有名气的电影里演过一个小角色之外，德帕迪以前从未演过英语电影。

examples.english: Celia looks just like her sister, except that her sister has shorter hair.
examples.chinese: 西莉亚长得跟姐姐一模一样，除了她姐姐是短发的。

examples.english: It's similar to Paris, except the people look a lot poorer.
examples.chinese: 这里跟巴黎很像，只是这里的人看起来贫穷很多。

examples.english: a computer that can do everything except talk
examples.chinese: 除了讲话样样都会做的电脑

examples.english: This is an excellent piece of work, apart from a couple of spelling mistakes.
examples.chinese: 作业做得很好，除了有几个拼写错误。

examples.english: Aside from its mineral resources, Mongolia's major assets are its 25.5 million livestock.
examples.chinese: 除了矿产资源，蒙古的主要资产是2，550万头牲口。

examples.english: Apart from going swimming occasionally, I don't get much exercise.
examples.chinese: 除了偶尔游游泳之外，我不大运动。

examples.english: I can come and see you any day but Tuesday.
examples.chinese: 除了星期二，我哪天都能来看你。

examples.english: There was nothing left but a few dried up sandwiches.
examples.chinese: 除了只剩几块干巴巴的三明治之外，什么都没有了。

examples.english: Anyone but Tommy would have realized I was trying to apologize.
examples.chinese: 除了汤米之外，谁都会明白我是在道歉。

examples.english: Other than at football matches, people sing less than they used to.
examples.chinese: 除了在足球场上，人们唱歌不如以前多了。

examples.english: Sam refused to discuss the argument, other than to say that Diane had called him ‘gutless’.
examples.chinese: 萨姆不肯谈论这次争吵的事，只说黛安娜骂他“胆小”。

examples.english: You should get a little stiffness, but other than that, there should be no side effects.
examples.chinese: 你应该会有点发僵，但除此之外应该没有什么副作用。

examples.english: The whole school, with the exception of the youngest class, had to attend the ceremony.
examples.chinese: 除了年龄最小的班级，全校都必须参加这个典礼。

examples.english: I think they should all pass the test, with the possible exception of Fauzi.
examples.chinese: 我想可能除了福齐之外，他们都能通过考试。

examples.english: I get hardly any mail, bar the occasional postcard from my mother.
examples.chinese: 我几乎没有任何邮件，除了我母亲偶尔会给我寄张明信片。

examples.english: He died with no possessions bar a small piece of land in Ireland.
examples.chinese: 除了在爱尔兰的一小块地以外，他去世的时候一无所有。

examples.english: There was complete silence but for the occasional sound of distant traffic.
examples.chinese: 要不是远处偶尔传来汽车的声音，这里真是一片寂静。

centers.english: someone or something that is not included
centers.chinese: 不包括在内的人或事物

examples.english: Most of the students did well, though there were one or two exceptions.
examples.chinese: 大多数学生都干得不错，不过有一两个人除外。

examples.english: Women do not usually get to the top in politics, but there have been a few notable exceptions.
examples.chinese: 女性一般在政界到不了高层，但是显然也有一些例外。

examples.english: With a few minor exceptions, the legal system in the two countries is very similar.
examples.chinese: 除了有几个小地方存在不同之外，这两个国家的司法制度非常相似。

examples.english: Most couples who break up seem to find it hard to remain friends. Kim and Gerry are exceptions to that rule.
examples.chinese: 大多数夫妻分手之后好像都很难继续做朋友，但是金和格里却是其中的例外。

centers.english: to consist of a number of parts or substances
centers.chinese: 由一些部分或物质组成

examples.english: Lorna's whole wardrobe consisted of jeans, tee shirts, and sweaters.
examples.chinese: 洛娜的全部衣服包括牛仔裤、T恤衫和毛衫。

examples.english: Up to 70% of your total body weight is made up of water.
examples.chinese: 高达70%的人体重量由水构成。

examples.english: The executive board is made up of public officials, citizens, and businesspeople.
examples.chinese: 管理委员会由公务员、市民和商人组成。

examples.english: The candlesticks are made of brass.
examples.chinese: 蜡烛台是用黄铜做的。

examples.english: She mixed a batter made of flour, eggs, and water.
examples.chinese: 她用面粉、鸡蛋和水调了一份面糊。

examples.english: What's this carpet made of?
examples.chinese: 这块地毯是用什么做的？

examples.english: The eight-string ‘guitar’ he played was made out of a roasting pan.
examples.chinese: 他弹奏的那把八弦“吉他”是用一只烤盘做成的。

examples.english: Tyra Banks wore a bikini made out of toilet paper.
examples.chinese: 泰拉·班克斯穿着用卫生纸做的比基尼装。

examples.english: At my grandparents’ we would take turns riding on a swing made out of an old tire.
examples.chinese: 在爷爷奶奶家，我们轮流坐一只用旧轮胎做的秋千。

examples.english: The earth's atmosphere is composed mainly of nitrogen, oxygen, and carbon dioxide.
examples.chinese: 地球大气主要由氮气、氧气和二氧化碳组成。

examples.english: The human body is composed of billions of tiny cells.
examples.chinese: 人体由数十亿微小的细胞组成。

examples.english: What is the chemical composition of lava?
examples.chinese: 熔岩的化学成分是什么？

examples.english: The house comprises 2 bedrooms, a kitchen, and a living room.
examples.chinese: 这幢房子包括两间卧室、一个厨房和一间起居室。

examples.english: The city's population comprises mainly Asians and Europeans.
examples.chinese: 该城人口主要由亚洲人和欧洲人组成。

centers.english: to have or include something as a part

examples.english: Does this fish have bones in it?
examples.chinese: 这种鱼有刺吗？

examples.english: I can't find a pen that has any ink in it.
examples.chinese: 我找不出一支有墨水的钢笔。

expressions.gram: transitive verb not in progressive or passive

examples.english: It is important to eat meat or eggs, as they contain protein and vitamins.
examples.chinese: 食用肉或鸡蛋很重要，因为它们含有蛋白质和多种维生素。

examples.english: The film was banned because it contained a number of extremely violent scenes.
examples.chinese: 该影片有些镜头极为暴力，所以被禁映了。

examples.english: Arlene collects teddy bears.
examples.chinese: 阿琳收集玩具熊。

examples.english: Nigel's hobby is collecting rare books.
examples.chinese: 奈杰尔爱好收集珍本图书。

examples.english: Anyone who collects jazz records should buy this book. It's full of information on old recordings.
examples.chinese: 任何收藏爵士乐唱片的人都应该买这本书—书中有很多介绍旧唱片的资料。

examples.english: He's been a coin collector for years.
examples.chinese: 他收藏钱币有好些年了。

examples.english: The gallery was full of art collectors and dealers.
examples.chinese: 画廊里全是艺术品收藏家和画商。

examples.english: He's an avid collector of Beatles memorabilia.
examples.chinese: 他是披头士纪念品的热心收藏者。

examples.english: Have you seen Alvin's stamp collection?
examples.chinese: 你见过阿尔文的邮票藏品吗?

examples.english: On the shelf was his mother's collection of crystal vases.
examples.chinese: 架子上摆着她母亲收藏的水晶花瓶。

examples.english: The museum has one of the world's finest collections of Impressionist paintings.
examples.chinese: 该博物馆的印象派藏画是世界上顶级的。

examples.english: The head teacher was presented with a set of the Encyclopaedia Britannica, worth more than £1,600.
examples.chinese: 校长获赠一套价值超过1,600英镑的《不列颠百科全书》。

examples.english: For sale - ‘The Guitarist’ magazine - complete set, 1984-1992.
examples.chinese: 出售—《吉他手》杂志—1984年至1992年全套。

examples.english: a set of commemorative gold coins
examples.chinese: 一套纪念金币

examples.english: What's that thing on the kitchen table?
examples.chinese: 厨房桌子上的那东西是什么？

examples.english: There were several things that I wanted to discuss.
examples.chinese: 有几件事我想讨论一下。

examples.english: I cried during the whole thing.
examples.chinese: 整个过程中我一直在哭。

examples.english: The first thing we need to do is call Becky.
examples.chinese: 我们要做的第一件事是给贝姬打电话。

examples.english: We went to the aquarium, and they have this neat new thing where the tide goes in and out over a rock pool.
examples.chinese: 我们去了水族馆，他们弄了个巧妙的新玩艺，让潮水在一个岩石潭里涌进涌出。

examples.english: I need to get something for Greg - it's his birthday tomorrow.
examples.chinese: 我得买点东西给格雷格，明天是他生日。

examples.english: There's something on your shirt, on the back.
examples.chinese: 你的衬衫上有什么东西，在背上。

examples.english: Something went wrong with the pumping system in the pool.
examples.chinese: 水池的抽水系统出了些问题。

examples.english: Do you want to hear something really funny?
examples.chinese: 你想听点非常有趣的事吗?

examples.english: He wanted to get her something special, something expensive.
examples.chinese: 他想给她买点什么特别的、贵重的东西。

examples.english: I've just remembered something else I wanted to tell you.
examples.chinese: 我刚想到还有件事要告诉你。

examples.english: I need to have something to eat before we go out.
examples.chinese: 我们出门之前我要吃点东西。

examples.english: There's a stone or a nail or something stuck in my shoe.
examples.chinese: 有石子或钉子什么东西嵌在我的鞋里了。

examples.english: Children should be able to point to each object as they count it.
examples.chinese: 儿童数东西时应该能把它们一个一个的指着。

examples.english: The sculpture is made from objects he found on beaches in Mexico.
examples.chinese: 这件雕塑是用他在墨西哥海滩上找到的物件做成的。

examples.english: After his stroke, he was able to name inanimate objects like saws and shovels, but unable to name most living things.
examples.chinese: 中风后他能够叫得出锯子、铲子等无生命物体的名称，但大多数有生命的东西却叫不出来。

examples.english: The line at the checkout was for people with eight items or fewer.
examples.chinese: 购买八件或八件以下物品的顾客在此收银台前排队。

examples.english: A comfortable, adjustable chair is the single most important item for the health of a computer user.
examples.chinese: 一把舒适的可调节的椅子对电脑使用者的健康来说是最要紧的东西。

examples.english: The museum has over 5,000 items of historical interest.
examples.chinese: 这座博物馆藏有五千多件具有历史价值的文物。

examples.english: The main item of jewellery worn by men, other than a watch, is cuff links.
examples.chinese: 男人佩戴的主要饰物除了手表就是链扣了。

examples.english: Bring any old household items for the sale.
examples.chinese: 把任何旧的家用物品拿去卖掉。

examples.english: Many of the things that people in the West take for granted are considered to be luxury items here.
examples.chinese: 西方人习以为常的许多东西在这里却被看成是奢侈品。

examples.english: My aunt discovered that her old doll was a collector's item and worth a lot of money.
examples.chinese: 我姨妈发现她的旧布娃娃是一件很值钱的收藏品。

examples.english: Each article has a written history printed on a card below the display.
examples.chinese: 每件展品下面有张卡片，上面印有其历史。

examples.english: She didn't take much with her, just a few articles of clothing and a towel.
examples.chinese: 她随身带的东西不多，只有几件衣服和一条毛巾。

examples.english: Most of our wedding presents were household articles.
examples.chinese: 我们的结婚礼物大部分都是家用物品。

examples.english: Many Bronze Age artifacts were discovered at Luddesdown.
examples.chinese: 许多青铜器时代的手工艺品都是在鹿德士丹发现的。

examples.english: Do not buy any artefacts unless they have an export permit.
examples.chinese: 别买任何工艺品，除非它们有出口许可证。

examples.english: I threw a few things into a bag and ran to the car.
examples.chinese: 我往包里扔了几样东西就朝车子奔去。

examples.english: She's coming back later to get her things.
examples.chinese: 稍后她要回来拿东西。

examples.english: They sell furniture, toys, cards - all sorts of things.
examples.chinese: 他们出售家具、玩具、贺卡等各种各样的东西。

examples.english: I don't know how we're going to get all this stuff into the car.
examples.chinese: 我不知道我们怎样才能把所有这些东西塞进汽车。

examples.english: You're not going to have a lot of time to pack up your stuff before you move.
examples.chinese: 你在搬家前没有许多时间收拾东西了。

examples.english: I must clean out this cupboard - it's absolutely full of junk.
examples.chinese: 我一定要把这个橱柜清理一下，里面全是废旧杂物。

examples.english: They have so much junk in their yard. It makes the neighborhood look awful.
examples.chinese: 他们的院子里堆了那么多的杂物，弄得周围环境看起来很不像样。

examples.english: In the drawer she found a photograph, an old hairbrush, and various other odds and ends.
examples.chinese: 她在抽屉里找到了一张照片、一把旧梳子，以及其他一些零碎物品。

examples.english: Odds and ends that haven't sold have been drastically reduced in price.
examples.chinese: 没卖掉的零碎东西价格大跌。

expressions.text: bits and pieces/ bits and bobs

examples.english: There are all sorts of bits and pieces in this box.
examples.chinese: 这只箱子里装着各种杂物。

examples.english: Do any of these bits and bobs belong to you?
examples.chinese: 这些零碎杂物中，有没有什么东西是你的？

examples.english: The car is packed solid with all our camping paraphernalia.
examples.chinese: 车里塞满了我们的露营装备。

examples.english: She was charged with possessing drug paraphernalia.
examples.chinese: 她被起诉拥有全套吸毒用具。

centers.english: what you say when you do not know the name of something or cannot remember it
centers.chinese: 不知道某物的名称或想不起该名称时说的话

examples.english: Do you have a what's its name -- you know, one of those things for taking off wallpaper?
examples.chinese: 你有没有那个什么东西——你知道，就是剥墙纸的那种东西?

examples.english: I've broken the whatchamacallit on my purse.
examples.chinese: 我把手提包上的那个什么东西弄坏了。

examples.english: You need one of those whatsits to turn the bolt.
examples.chinese: 你需要一件什么玩艺儿来拧那个螺栓。

examples.english: You squeeze this little thingamajig, and it forces air into the pocket.
examples.chinese: 你挤压这个小玩艺，它就会把空气压进袋内。

examples.english: The towels are on the thingy at the top of the stairs.
examples.chinese: 毛巾在楼梯顶端的什么东西上面。

examples.english: He's got one of those electronic things, you know, that you can record all your addresses in.
examples.chinese: 他有一个什么电子玩意儿，可以把所有地址都储存进去。

examples.english: What's that box thing on the table?
examples.chinese: 桌上那盒子样的东西是什么?

examples.english: She was wearing one of those Spanish type jacket things.
examples.chinese: 她穿着那种西班牙式的什么夹克衫。

centers.chinese: 物体/物质/区域的一部分

examples.english: When you have filled in the form, keep the top part and send the other part to the bank.
examples.chinese: 填写好表格后自己保留上面一部分，余下部分寄给银行。

examples.english: All our replacement parts are guaranteed, if you have your car serviced with us each year.
examples.chinese: 如果你的车每年在我们这里检修，所有的替换部件都有保证。

examples.english: What part of Russia are you from?
examples.chinese: 你是俄罗斯哪个地方的人?

examples.english: This is the widest part of the river.
examples.chinese: 这里是河流的最宽处。

examples.english: Malaria is still common in many parts of Africa.
examples.chinese: 在非洲的许多地区，疟疾仍然常见。

examples.english: ‘Would you like a slice of cake?’ ‘I'll just have a little bit, please.’
examples.chinese: “吃块蛋糕好吗？”“我只要一小片。”

examples.english: the bit of the garden where the fruit trees are
examples.chinese: 花园里种着果树的一小块地方

examples.english: I found some bits of glass in my sandwich.
examples.chinese: 我在自己的三明治里发现几块玻璃碴。

examples.english: a 1000-piece jigsaw puzzle
examples.chinese: 1000片拼块的拼图玩具

examples.english: The equipment had to be taken apart and transported in pieces.
examples.chinese: 这台设备必须拆开运输。

examples.english: The factory makes aircraft engine components.
examples.chinese: 这家工厂制造飞机发动机部件。

examples.english: All the components should be tested before they are assembled.
examples.chinese: 所有的部件在组装前都必须经过检测。

examples.english: Gaining confidence is a major component of developing leadership skills.
examples.chinese: 获得信任是培养领导才能的重要组成部分。

examples.english: Weigh all the ingredients before you start.
examples.chinese: 开始前把所有的原料称一下。

examples.english: a list of ingredients
examples.chinese: 成分表

examples.english: The main ingredients can be prepared and frozen in advance.
examples.chinese: 主要材料可以预先准备好并冷冻起来。

examples.english: Coconut is a basic ingredient for many curries and other Asian dishes.
examples.chinese: 在许多咖喱食品和其他亚洲菜肴中，椰子是基本原料。

examples.english: Scientists have to break the compound down into its constituents in order to analyze it.
examples.chinese: 科学家为了进行分析，必须把化合物分解成它的化学成分。

examples.english: Magnesium and sodium are the main constituents of salt.
examples.chinese: 镁和钠是盐的基本化学成分。

examples.english: Fuel is carried in the lower portion of the rocket.
