examples.chinese: 燃料装在火箭的下部。

examples.english: Surgeons have had to remove portions of his stomach and intestine.
examples.chinese: 外科医生必须切除他的一部分胃和肠。

examples.english: The research suggests we only use a small portion of our brains at any one time.
examples.chinese: 该项研究显示，任何时候我们都只使用了脑子的一小部分。

examples.english: The final section of this chapter will deal with recent developments.
examples.chinese: 这章的最后部分将阐述最近的发展情况。

examples.english: First class seats are in the front section of the plane.
examples.chinese: 头等舱的座位在飞机前部。

examples.english: The disease spread through the poorer sections of the city.
examples.chinese: 这种病在该市较贫穷的地区蔓延。

examples.english: Decorate the cake with orange segments.
examples.chinese: 用橙瓣来装饰蛋糕。

examples.english: An ant's body is divided into three distinct segments.
examples.chinese: 蚂蚁的身体明显分为三节。

examples.english: Each sales team targets its efforts at a particular segment of the general population.
examples.chinese: 每个销售小组都定位于一般大众中的某一群体。

centers.english: part of a total amount or number
centers.chinese: 总数量或数目的一部分

examples.english: What proportion of your income do you spend on food?
examples.chinese: 食物支出占你的收入比重多少？

examples.english: The new jobs would largely be unskilled and a high proportion would be in inner city areas.
examples.chinese: 新职位大都不需要技术，而且大部分都在市中心贫民区。

examples.english: A significant proportion of the elderly are dependent on the basic state pension.
examples.chinese: 老年人中很大一部分依靠基本政府养老金过活。

examples.english: We get a small proportion of our funding from the government.
examples.chinese: 我们的经费中有一小部分来自政府的拨款。

examples.english: Employees’ salaries are just a fraction of the total cost of the project.
examples.chinese: 雇员工资只占项目总开支的一小部分。

examples.english: Faxes are expensive, when you consider you can send emails at a fraction of the cost for very much less money.
examples.chinese: 考虑到发送电子邮件花费很少，发传真就贵多了。

examples.english: a problem that affects only a small fraction of the total population
examples.chinese: 仅影响全体人口中一小部分人的问题

examples.english: What percentage of our students passed the exam?
examples.chinese: 我们学生的及格率是多少?

examples.english: The percentage of pensioners living below the poverty line has increased by 15% in the last four years.
examples.chinese: 过去的四年间，生活在贫困线以下的领取养老金者增加了15%。

examples.english: A high percentage of the coffee they produce goes to the US.
examples.chinese: 他们生产的咖啡大部分销往美国。

examples.english: Only a small percentage of African American employees were considered for promotion.
examples.chinese: 只有一小部分非洲裔美国人获考虑晋升。

centers.chinese: 故事/书/影片/戏剧等的一部分

examples.english: Jane Austen's ‘Pride and Prejudice’, adapted for radio in six parts
examples.chinese: 改编成六集广播剧的简·奥斯汀小说《傲慢与偏见》

examples.english: I've finished the first part of my thesis.
examples.chinese: 我已完成了论文的第一部分。

examples.english: Did you understand the part about switching the modem speed?
examples.chinese: 对于转换调制解调器速率的那一部分你理解吗？

examples.english: Part One ends with the death of the hero's father.
examples.chinese: 第一幕以男主人公父亲的死结束。

examples.english: My favourite bit is when they try to escape.
examples.chinese: 我最爱看他们试图逃跑的那一段。

examples.english: Some bits of the book are actually quite funny.
examples.chinese: 那本书中有些片段真的很有趣。

examples.english: That was one of the best episodes - I wish I'd got it on tape.
examples.chinese: 那一集棒极了—我真希望能用录像机录了下来。

examples.english: Brad Pitt made a guest appearance on last week's episode.
examples.chinese: 布拉德·皮特客串了上周的那一集。

examples.english: Ernie directed all 12 of the half-hour episodes for television.
examples.chinese: 厄尼执导了全部12集半小时的电视片。

examples.english: I've never even seen an episode of Star Trek.
examples.chinese: 我连一集《星际迷航》也没看过。

examples.english: Oliver Stone was in Thailand shooting the final instalment in his Vietnam trilogy, Heaven And Earth.
examples.chinese: 奥利弗·斯通在泰国拍摄他的越南三步曲的最后一部《天与地》。

examples.english: Dickens wrote his novels in weekly instalments for a magazine.
examples.chinese: 狄更斯为一家杂志社写连载小说，每周一期。

examples.english: We are proud to present the second instalment of our fantastic six-part competition to win a Renault Clio.
examples.chinese: 我们举办六集引人入胜的比赛节目，奖品是雷诺公司的“克里奥”汽车，第二集现在开始了，很高兴跟大家见面。

examples.english: These matters are dealt with in Chapters 8 & 9.
examples.chinese: 这些问题在第八、第九章里探讨。

examples.english: ‘Have you finished ‘Lord of the Rings’ yet?’ ‘I'm on the last chapter.’
examples.chinese: “你看完《魔戒》了吗？”“我在看最后一章。”

examples.english: The sex scenes between Depardieu and Brochet are sensitively filmed.
examples.chinese: 德帕迪约和波诺什的做爱场景处理得很细致。

examples.english: The ghost appears in Act 2, Scene 1.
examples.chinese: 幽灵在第二幕第一场中出现。

examples.english: The opening scene of the movie features the gangsters discussing their next heist.
examples.chinese: 该影片一开始是匪徒们讨论下一次抢劫的场景。

examples.english: In the following extract, Jones presents the arguments in favour of nuclear power.
examples.chinese: 在下面的引文中，琼斯表达了支持使用核电的论点。

examples.english: The book contains previously unpublished material, including extracts from diaries, letters and taped interviews.
examples.chinese: 这本书含有以前未发表过的材料，包括日记、信件及录音访谈的节选。

examples.english: I'd like to read out a short excerpt from the poem.
examples.chinese: 我想朗读那首诗的一小段。

examples.english: The following excerpt is from one of my students’ essays.
examples.chinese: 下面一小段是从我的一个学生的文章中摘录的。

examples.english: He played some excerpts from Grieg's piano concerto.
examples.chinese: 他演奏了几段格里格的《钢琴协奏曲》。

examples.english: The police have released a video clip of the attack.
examples.chinese: 警方公布了那次袭击的一小段录像。

examples.english: The new software makes it possible to cut and paste sound or video clips from one application to another.
examples.chinese: 这种新的软件可以把一个应用程序中的声音或录像剪贴到另一程序中去。

examples.english: I saw a clip from the new Michael Douglas movie on TV last night.
examples.chinese: 昨天夜里，我在电视上看到迈克尔·道格拉斯新拍摄的电影的片段。

examples.english: Our store has branches all over the country.
examples.chinese: 我们在全国各地都设有分店。

examples.english: I'm sorry, we can't change foreign currency. We're only a small branch, you see.
examples.chinese: 对不起，我们无法兑换外币。你知道，我们只是家小分店。

examples.english: You can deposit money at any branch of the Northwest Pacific Bank.
examples.chinese: 你可以在西北太平洋银行任何一家分行存款。

examples.english: Our department deals mainly with exports.
examples.chinese: 我们部门主要负责出口事务。

examples.english: Which department do you work in?
examples.chinese: 你在哪个部门工作？

examples.english: Melissa is in charge of the Marketing Department.
examples.chinese: 梅利莎负责市场部。

examples.english: She works in the Humanities department
examples.chinese: 她在人文学系上班。

examples.english: the Department of Trade and Industry
examples.chinese: 贸易与工业部

examples.english: the Department of Experimental Psychology
examples.chinese: 实验心理学系

examples.english: The sales and advertising departments are both part of the marketing division.
examples.chinese: 销售科和广告科都是市场部的下属部门。

examples.english: I work in the administration division as a mail mover.
examples.chinese: 我在管理部门做邮递员。

examples.english: the Japanese division of American Express
examples.chinese: 美国运通公司日本分部

examples.english: The party's Young Conservatives section is growing fast.
examples.chinese: 该党“年轻的保守党人”这一部分发展迅速。

examples.english: The tutor asked the brass section to play their piece again.
examples.chinese: 指导老师要求铜管乐器组再演奏一遍他们的曲子。

examples.english: We had to go to the ‘late payments’ section of the Financial Aid office.
examples.chinese: 我们不得不去经济援助部的“逾期付款”处。

examples.english: The growth in the number of home computers has boosted the electronics sector.
examples.chinese: 家用电脑数量的增长促进了电子业。

examples.english: The new sales tax caused problems for the retail sector the shops and stores that sell goods to the public.
examples.chinese: 新增加的销售税给零售业带来了麻烦。

examples.english: The main source of work here is public sector employment.
examples.chinese: 本地的工作职位主要来自公共部门。

examples.english: Private sector pay increases were again above the rate of inflation.
examples.chinese: 私营部门的工资增长再次超过通货膨胀率。

examples.english: The racist right wing staged their biggest demonstration yet in the main square.
examples.chinese: 右翼种族主义分子派系在大广场上举行了最大规模的示威活动。

examples.english: The Tamil Tigers have had a political wing since 1976, but never registered it as a legal party.
examples.chinese: 自1976年以来，该组织就成立了一个政治机构，但从未注册为合法政党。

examples.english: They were members of the Marxist wing of the Socialist Party.
examples.chinese: 他们是社会主义党中的马克思主义派成员。

examples.english: I'm in charge of production, and Martha takes care of the financial side.
examples.chinese: 我管理生产，玛莎负责财务方面。

centers.english: one of the parts of a process

examples.english: Organizing the party was easy, the hardest part was getting my parents to agree to it.
examples.chinese: 组织聚会容易，最难的一步是取得我父母同意。

examples.english: Which part of your job do you enjoy most?
examples.chinese: 你最喜欢自己工作的哪方面？

examples.english: She spent the early part of her life in Barcelona.
examples.chinese: 她早年是在巴塞罗那度过的。

examples.english: Part of the research program involved interviewing teenagers in inner-city areas.
examples.chinese: 研究计划的一部分是采访城内贫民区的青少年。

examples.english: Alan did the easy bit -- it was me who did all the hard work!
examples.chinese: 艾伦干了简单的部分——是我干了所有的重活儿。

examples.english: I'll probably do a bit of gardening this weekend.
examples.chinese: 这个周末我可能要干点园艺活。

examples.english: Dan has never gone through a rebellious stage.
examples.chinese: 丹从未经历过叛逆阶段。

examples.english: Many women feel depressed during the early stages of pregnancy.
examples.chinese: 许多女性在怀孕初期有抑郁感。

examples.english: We saw a video showing the second stage in the development of a human embryo.
examples.chinese: 我们看了一部人类胚胎发育第二阶段的录像片。

examples.english: At this stage of the election campaign, it is impossible to say who will win.
examples.chinese: 在大选的这个阶段，不可能说准谁会赢。

examples.english: We reached the stage where we'd given up any hopes of seeing our daughter alive.
examples.chinese: 到了这个阶段，我们已经放弃女儿生还的希望。

examples.english: ‘How's your dissertation coming on?’ ‘I'm at the writing-up stage.’
examples.chinese: “你的论文进展如何？”“我已经动笔在写。”

examples.english: The next step will be to make the pasta sauce.
examples.chinese: 下一步是做意大利面食的调味汁。

examples.english: The first step towards achieving peace in the region will be to elect a government that represents all the people.
examples.chinese: 实现该地区和平的第一步是选出代表全体民众的政府。

examples.english: The doctors say I'll make a full recovery, but I'm going to have to take it one step at a time.
examples.chinese: 医生都说我会痊愈的，但是还得一步一步来。

examples.english: I'd like to discuss the production phase at this morning's meeting.
examples.chinese: 今早的会上我想讨论一下生产阶段的事。

examples.english: There are three phases in the lifecycle of a butterfly.
examples.chinese: 蝴蝶的生命周期要经历三个阶段。

examples.english: The initial phase of the project should take about three months.
examples.chinese: 该工程的最初阶段要耗时三个月。

examples.english: As the war enters its final phase, the UN will probably consider lifting sanctions.
examples.chinese: 战争进入最后阶段，联合国可能会考虑取消制裁。

centers.chinese: 情况/主题/性格的一部分

examples.english: The inspectors will examine health and safety aspects at the plant.
examples.chinese: 视察人员要检查这家工厂保健与安全方面的情况。

examples.english: Chris is dealing with the commercial aspects of this ambitious project.
examples.chinese: 这项雄心勃勃的计划中，克里斯负责商务方面。

examples.english: The country was on the brink of war, and fear and uncertainty permeated every aspect of daily life.
examples.chinese: 该国正处于战争边缘，恐惧和不安渗透到日常生活的各方面。

examples.english: Weiskopf was a talented and successful man, but he did have a cruel side.
examples.chinese: 魏斯科普夫颇有天赋而且事业有成，但他的确有残忍的一面。

examples.english: I'd like to move away from the theory now, to concentrate on the practical side of engineering.
examples.chinese: 现在我想把重点从理论转移到工程学的实际应用方面。

examples.english: You are enthusiastic, but on the negative side, you can be impatient and critical.
examples.chinese: 你很热情，但缺点是不耐心、爱挑剔。

examples.english: Try to see the funny side of the situation.
examples.chinese: 尽量看看情况有趣的一面。

examples.english: the lighter side of the conference, as seen by our political cartoonist
examples.chinese: 我们的政治漫画家眼中那次会议轻松的一面

examples.english: The arrival of the South African team has brought a new dimension to the competition.
examples.chinese: 南非队的到来使比赛面目一新。

examples.english: The political dimensions of the incident are clear.
examples.chinese: 该事件的政治前因后果显而易见。

examples.english: a revival of interest in the spiritual and moral dimensions of life
examples.chinese: 对生活中精神和道德方面的兴趣的复苏

examples.english: The new art gallery is impressive, but I felt the human dimension had been lost.
examples.chinese: 新建的美术馆给人印象深刻，但是我觉得人性方面缺失了。

examples.english: There are one or two factors we haven't considered yet.
examples.chinese: 有一两个因素我们还未考虑过。

examples.english: The issue of abortion rights is obviously not the only factor affecting the female vote.
examples.chinese: 堕胎权问题显然并不是影响女性选票的唯一因素。

examples.english: Traders said several factors contributed to Nasdaq's weakness.
examples.chinese: 证券商称纳斯达克指数低迷有几个因素。

examples.english: The most important factor in professional sport is psychology.
examples.chinese: 职业体育比赛中最重要的因素是心理。

examples.english: His formal education was a less significant factor in his upbringing than practical experience.
examples.chinese: 对于教养而言，他接受的正规教育不及实际经历那么重要。

examples.english: The planning proposals have three main elements.
examples.chinese: 建议中的计划分三个主要部分。

examples.english: There's always been an element of competition between me and my brother.
examples.chinese: 我和弟弟之间始终存在一点竞争。

examples.english: Instead of a single plot, there are several elements in the story.
examples.chinese: 该故事贯穿着好几个组成部分，而不是单一情节，

examples.english: We've reached the stage where public image is the most important element in the Presidency.
examples.chinese: 我们已经到这样的地步，身为总统，最重要的是公众形象。

examples.english: I see helping the community as one of the key elements of my work.
examples.chinese: 我将帮助社区作为工作的最重要部分。

examples.english: Are there any special features about the way Ireland trains its teachers?
examples.chinese: 爱尔兰培训教师有没有特别之处?

examples.english: Federalism remains a very important feature of American politics.
examples.chinese: 联邦主义一直是美国政治中的重要特征。

examples.english: One of the features of auto-immune diseases is that they are often genetically similar.
examples.chinese: 自身免疫疾病的一个特点是遗传学上相似。

centers.english: to be a part of something

examples.english: Falling over is part of the process of learning to ski.
examples.chinese: 跌跤是学习滑雪过程中的一部分。

examples.english: It is part of the doctor's job to give advice on emotional problems.
examples.chinese: 就病人的情绪问题提供咨询是医生工作的一部分。

examples.english: Restrictions on foreign trade are part of the state's economic and legal system.
examples.chinese: 限制外贸是该国经济和法律体制的一部分。

examples.english: Group discussion forms a major part of classwork.
examples.chinese: 小组讨论是课堂作业的主要组成部分。

examples.english: The company forms part of the United Holdings group.
examples.chinese: 该公司是“联合控股”集团的一部分。

examples.english: These three books form part of a series on religion in the modern world.
examples.chinese: 这三本书是有关现代世界宗教系列书籍的一部分。

examples.english: Money is unfortunately an inherent part of politics.
examples.chinese: 遗憾的是金钱是政治固有的一部分。

examples.english: Surgical procedures have many risks inherent in them.
examples.chinese: 手术过程本身存在许多风险。

examples.english: the uncertainties that are inherent in the research and development process
examples.chinese: 研究和发展过程中固有的不确定性

examples.english: Is mankind an inherently violent species?
examples.chinese: 人类生来就是凶暴的物种吗？

examples.english: Could I have a glass of water, please?
examples.chinese: 请给我一杯水好吗？

examples.english: Humans can't survive for more than a few days without water.
examples.chinese: 人没有水的话活不了几天。

examples.english: This reservoir supplies water to half of Los Angeles.
examples.chinese: 这个水库向半个洛杉矶供水。

examples.english: Stone fish lie on the ocean bed, often in shallow water.
examples.chinese: 石头鱼躺在海底，通常是在浅水区域。

examples.english: Some of the bacteria are found in rivers, lakes, mud, and even rain water.
examples.chinese: 有些细菌可见于河流、湖泊、淤泥，甚至雨水中。

examples.english: Never drink sea water.
examples.chinese: 绝不要喝海水。

examples.english: As we got deeper into the forest we could hear the sound of running water.
examples.chinese: 随着我们进入森林更深处，我们听到了流水声。

examples.english: All the rooms in the hotel have hot and cold running water.
examples.chinese: 酒店所有客房都有冷热自来水。

examples.english: By the end of the hot summer of '76, there was a serious water shortage.
examples.chinese: 76年炎夏快结束的时候，出现了严重的水荒。

examples.english: The water level of the River Thames has risen 14" in the past few days.
examples.chinese: 最近几天，泰晤士河的水位上升了14英寸。

examples.english: Condensed milk is produced by removing about 50% of the water content of whole milk.
examples.chinese: 炼乳是去掉全脂牛奶中大约50%的水分制成的。

examples.english: In the summer, temperatures rose to 90 or 100 degrees, and the air was constantly heavy with moisture.
examples.chinese: 夏天，气温达90或100度，空气中的水分一直很高。

examples.english: Moisture is essential for keeping your skin fresh and youthful.
examples.chinese: 水分对于保持皮肤清新、有活力极其重要。

examples.english: Nearby ditches and walls affect the moisture content of the soil.
examples.chinese: 附近的沟渠和墙影响土壤的水分含量。

centers.english: when a lot of water covers a place that is usually dry
centers.chinese: 大量的水淹了通常是干燥的地方

examples.english: Last winter, the town suffered the worst floods for fifty years.
examples.chinese: 去年冬天，该镇遭受了50年来最严重的水灾。

examples.english: There has been an extensive programme of restorations in Venice since the 1966 flood.
examples.chinese: 自从1966年水灾发生以后，威尼斯一直在进行大规模的修复计划。

examples.english: Yosemite National Park is restricting access to the Park in order to cope with the flood damage.
examples.chinese: 约塞米蒂国家公园现正限制人们进入，以处理洪水造成的破坏。

examples.english: Helicopters continued to search for others who had climbed trees to escape from the flood waters.
examples.chinese: 直升机继续搜寻其他为躲避洪水而爬到树上去的人。

examples.english: the wide flood plains of the River Nile
examples.chinese: 尼罗河广大的洪泛区

examples.english: Parts of the harbour wall collapsed, causing serious flooding in the town.
examples.chinese: 港口岸壁有些地方倒塌，造成镇上洪水严重泛滥。

examples.english: The government is to receive £200,000 in emergency European Community aid, to help victims of the flooding.
examples.chinese: 政府准备接受欧盟20万英镑的紧急援助，以帮助水灾灾民。

examples.english: Many homes in Jakarta were flooded in the Indonesian capital's worst deluge for years.
examples.chinese: 印度尼西亚首都发生多年来最严重的洪灾，雅加达许多住房被淹浸。

examples.english: Three major rivers have already flooded, and two more are on red alert.
examples.chinese: 三条大河已经泛滥，还有两条已到了红色警戒水位。

examples.english: After two days of continuous rain, the village was flooded.
examples.chinese: 接连两天不断地下雨，村子被淹没了。

examples.english: Melting snow floods the valleys each spring.
examples.chinese: 每年春天，积雪消融，淹漫山谷。

examples.english: Emergency officials will tour flooded areas to assess the extent of the damage.
examples.chinese: 紧急事务官员将巡视被淹地区，评估受灾程度。

examples.english: The currents in these parts could carry a boat miles out to sea.
examples.chinese: 这些地方的水流可以把一艘小船漂到很远的大海。

examples.english: It's dangerous to swim in the sea here because the current is so strong.
examples.chinese: 在这块海域游泳有危险，因为水流很急。

examples.english: The tiny young drift on the ocean currents, until a few are lucky enough to land in a suitable place and begin a new life.
examples.chinese: 幼小的生命随洋流漂来漂去，直到有一些幸运地登上合适的土地，开始新生活。

examples.english: The river occasionally becomes a torrent after a downpour, and may even cause flooding.
examples.chinese: 暴雨过后，河水有时会变得湍急，甚至可能引发洪水。

examples.english: A torrent of water flowed down the street.
examples.chinese: 湍急的水流冲过街道。

examples.english: After five days of heavy rain the Telle River was a raging torrent.
examples.chinese: 下了五天大雨之后，泰勒河成了汹涌的激流。

examples.english: There was no shelter anywhere and the rain was coming down in torrents.
examples.chinese: 大雨如注，又没有一个可以躲雨的地方。

examples.english: Torrential rain and gale-force storms left many coastal roads impassable.
examples.chinese: 倾盆大雨加上狂风，使得许多沿海道路无法通行。

centers.english: to supply farmland, plants etc with water

examples.english: Would you mind watering my plants while I'm away?
examples.chinese: 我不在的时候你能帮忙为我浇花吗?

examples.english: During the drought, residents were barred from watering their gardens, or washing their cars.
examples.chinese: 在干旱期，禁止居民给花园浇水或洗车。

examples.english: Many farmers use low-flying aircraft to water their crops.
examples.chinese: 许多农场主使用低空飞机给庄稼浇水。

examples.english: The stored water is then used to irrigate nearby agricultural land.
examples.chinese: 储存的水于是用来灌溉附近的农田。

examples.english: A system of channels carries water down from the mountains to irrigate the soil.
examples.chinese: 一套水渠系统引水下山，灌溉土地。

examples.english: methods of irrigation
examples.chinese: 灌溉方法

centers.english: to add water to another liquid

examples.english: Pour a little of the antiseptic into a bowl and dilute it before bathing the cut.
examples.chinese: 倒一点消毒剂在碗里，稀释后用来清洗伤口。

examples.english: To make citron pressé, dilute fresh lemon juice with water and add sugar.
examples.chinese: 做柠檬汁，要将新鲜柠檬汁用水稀释并加糖。

examples.english: Continue diluting the tomato sauce with red wine, according to taste.
examples.chinese: 依口味掺红酒把番茄酱稀释。

examples.english: Try giving the baby diluted fruit juice fruit juice diluted with water
examples.chinese: 试着每天给宝宝喂一两次稀释的果汁。

examples.english: I'm sure they water down the tomato ketchup at school.
examples.chinese: 我肯定他们给学校的番茄酱掺水。

examples.english: You'll find the paint drips everywhere if you water it down too much.
examples.chinese: 要是水掺得太多，涂料会滴得到处都是。

examples.english: It's a very good whisky. Much too good to water down.
examples.chinese: 这种威士忌酒很好，太好了，不能掺水。

examples.english: They served us some disgusting watered-down wine.
examples.chinese: 他们给我们的是掺了水的葡萄酒，很难喝。

examples.english: These fish are particularly fond of vegetable foods, and will usually eat tender aquatic plants.
examples.chinese: 这些鱼特别喜欢以植物为食，常吃嫩的水生植物。

examples.english: The hippopotamus is semi-aquatic lives partly in water and partly on the land.
examples.chinese: 河马是半水栖的。

examples.english: Unfortunately, fertilizers from surrounding farmland have reduced the aquatic life.
examples.chinese: 不幸的是，周围农田排出的肥料令水生生物的数量减少了。

examples.english: Most species of frogs are amphibious.
examples.chinese: 大部分蛙类都是水陆两栖的。

examples.english: Dinosaurs were probably the first ancestors of amphibious reptiles and fish.
examples.chinese: 恐龙很可能是两栖爬行动物和鱼类的始祖。

centers.english: something that does not let water pass through it

examples.english: A warm, waterproof jacket is the first thing you need for mountain walking.
examples.chinese: 一件保暖、防水的外套是山区远足第一件必备物品。

examples.english: The Gore-tex fabric manages to be completely waterproof, and yet allows body moisture to escape.
examples.chinese: 戈尔特斯物料能做到完全防水，但仍可以排出人体湿气。

examples.english: a waterproof watch
examples.chinese: 防水手表

examples.english: The cameras had been stored in watertight containers.
examples.chinese: 照相机储藏在不透水的容器里。

examples.english: Most wooden ships were watertight in harbour, but they all leaked when they got out to sea.
examples.chinese: 大多数木船在港口都不漏水，但出海都漏了。

centers.english: a fire that damages a building, forest, etc

examples.english: Eleven people died in a fire in Chicago early Monday.
examples.chinese: 周一一早芝加哥的一场大火中有11人丧生。

examples.english: The fire quickly spread throughout the building.
examples.chinese: 大火迅速蔓延至整幢大楼。

examples.english: Investigators say the fire probably broke out in the hotel kitchen.
examples.chinese: 调查人员认为这次火灾可能最先从该旅馆的厨房燃烧起来。

examples.english: The fire was started by an electrical fault.
examples.chinese: 这场火灾由电力故障引起。

examples.english: A forest fire had been raging in the south and the sky in that direction had a deep red glow.
examples.chinese: 南面一场森林大火正在肆虐，那个方向的天空泛着深红色的火光。

examples.english: Firefighters struggled to control the blaze.
examples.chinese: 消防员奋力控制这场大火。

examples.english: The church was completely destroyed in the blaze.
examples.chinese: 教堂在大火中被彻底烧毁了。

examples.english: Eleven homes and several businesses were destroyed in the inferno.
examples.chinese: 11户人家和几家商店毁于火海之中。

examples.english: He rushed back into the inferno to rescue his two-year-old sister, Cora, who had been trapped inside.
examples.chinese: 他冲回火海中去营救两岁的妹妹科拉，她被困在里面了。

examples.english: I saw flames coming from the engine.
examples.chinese: 我看见引擎内蹿出火焰。

examples.english: She frantically sprayed the flames with a fire extinguisher.
examples.chinese: 她慌乱地用灭火器往火焰上面喷射。

centers.english: a fire for making you warm, for cooking, or for burning things
centers.chinese: 取暖、煮饭菜或烧东西的火

examples.english: Could you bring in some wood for the fire?
examples.chinese: 你搬些木柴进来烧火好吗?

examples.english: In the evenings the whole family would gather around the fire.
examples.chinese: 到了晚上全家人都会围坐在炉火边。

examples.english: There's nothing more comforting than a blazing log fire.
examples.chinese: 没有比熊熊柴火更令人舒服的了。

examples.english: The old man lit a fire in the stove of the front room.
examples.chinese: 老人在前房内燃起炉火。

examples.english: The bonfire will be lit at 7.00 p.m., with fireworks starting just 15 minutes later.
examples.chinese: 晚上7点钟将燃起篝火，仅15分钟后就开始放烟火。

examples.english: They piled up scrap wood, boxes and other junk and made a big bonfire.
examples.chinese: 他们把碎木、盒子及其他废旧杂物堆起来点起一堆很大的篝火。

examples.english: Never leave a campfire unattended.
examples.chinese: 别让营火烧着没人照看。

examples.english: That night we sat around the campfire telling stories.
examples.chinese: 那天夜里我们围坐在营火旁讲故事。

centers.english: the heat and light produced by something that is burning
centers.chinese: 燃烧的东西发出的热和光

examples.english: Most animals are afraid of fire.
examples.chinese: 大多数动物都怕火。

examples.english: When did humans first learn to use fire?
examples.chinese: 人类最早是什么时候学会使用火的？

examples.english: Natural gas burns with a bright blue flame.
examples.chinese: 天然气燃烧时会出现明亮的蓝色火焰。

examples.english: You can sterilize a needle by holding it in a flame.
examples.chinese: 你可以把针放在火上消毒。

examples.english: The candle flame flickered and then went out.
examples.chinese: 烛光闪烁不定，后来就熄灭了。

centers.english: to make or start a fire

examples.english: He made a fire out of old rags and newspapers.
examples.chinese: 他用旧碎布和旧报纸生火。

examples.english: There isn't enough wood here to build a fire.
examples.chinese: 这里的木材不够，生不起火来。

examples.english: It was her job to light a fire every morning before the family got up.
examples.chinese: 每天早上在一家人起来前生好火是她的职责。

examples.english: In such a strong wind it was almost impossible to light a fire.
examples.chinese: 风那么大，几乎都点不着火。

examples.english: The kids accidentally started a fire in the garage.
examples.chinese: 孩子们意外地在车库里造成了一场火灾。

examples.english: The fire was started by a carelessly tossed cigarette.
examples.chinese: 这场火是由一个随手扔下的烟蒂引起的。

examples.english: Police are treating the fire as a case of arson.
examples.chinese: 警方将这次火灾作为纵火处理。

examples.english: Brooks was arrested for arson in North Carolina.
examples.chinese: 布鲁克斯在北卡罗莱纳以纵火罪被逮捕。

centers.english: to stop a fire from burning

examples.english: It took firefighters four hours to put out the blaze.
examples.chinese: 消防员花了四小时才扑灭这场大火。

examples.english: She threw sand on the fire to put it out.
examples.chinese: 她把沙子倒在火上来灭火。

examples.english: He managed to extinguish the flames with his coat.
examples.chinese: 他设法用自己的外套扑灭了火。

examples.english: It took several hours to extinguish the blaze.
examples.chinese: 花了好几个小时才扑灭了这场大火。

examples.english: He blew out the candle and went to sleep.
examples.chinese: 他吹灭了蜡烛就睡觉了。

examples.english: We tried to light a fire but the wind kept blowing it out.
examples.chinese: 我们想点火，可是风不断把它吹灭。

examples.english: If the victim's clothes are burning, use a blanket to smother the flames.
examples.chinese: 如果受害者的衣服在燃烧，用毯子把火闷熄。

centers.english: people whose job is to stop fires

examples.english: Firefighters rescued the children, who were trapped in an upstairs room.
examples.chinese: 消防员救出了被困在楼上房间里的儿童。

examples.english: It took firefighters over two hours to put out the fire.
examples.chinese: 消防员花了两个多小时才将火扑灭。

examples.english: Over 300 firefighters were killed when the North Tower collapsed.
examples.chinese: 三百多名消防员在北楼倒塌时丧生。

examples.english: Two firemen died in a blaze.
examples.chinese: 两名消防员葬身火海。

examples.english: I wanted to be a fireman when I was a child.
examples.chinese: 我小时候想当一名消防员。

examples.english: The fire brigade arrived promptly and the fire was quickly brought under control.
examples.chinese: 消防队迅速到达，火势很快得到控制。

examples.english: Spending on police and fire departments accounts for about 55 percent of the city's general fund.
examples.chinese: 警察和消防队的开支约占该市一般经费的55%。

examples.english: She lit a fire and burned his letters one by one.
examples.chinese: 她点了火，把他的信一封接一封地烧掉了。

examples.english: Someone had dropped a cigarette and burned a hole in the carpet.
examples.chinese: 有人丢了一根香烟，把地毯烧了个洞。

examples.english: Most of his possessions had been burnt to a cinder.
examples.chinese: 他的大部分东西都被烧成了灰。

examples.english: The cake is slightly burnt, I'm afraid.
examples.chinese: 恐怕蛋糕有点烤焦了。

examples.english: Police believe students are responsible for burning down the school.
examples.chinese: 警方认为烧毁学校是学生所为。

examples.english: Her ex-husband threatened to burn the house down with her and the kids inside.
examples.chinese: 她前夫威胁说要把房子连她和孩子在内一起烧掉。

examples.english: Household waste is usually incinerated after it has been collected.
examples.chinese: 家居垃圾通常先被收集起来，然后焚毁。

examples.english: All the clothes that were affected by radiation had to be incinerated.
examples.chinese: 所有受到辐射的衣服都得焚毁。

examples.english: The heater was left on all night and it scorched the wall.
examples.chinese: 取暖器开了一夜，把墙壁都烤焦了。

examples.english: Having the iron on a very high heat can scorch the fabric.
examples.chinese: 熨斗温度调得太高会把织物烫坏。

examples.english: This shirt is ruined - there's a big scorch mark on the back.
examples.chinese: 这件衬衫完了—背上有一大块烫焦的痕迹。

examples.english: The flames were hot enough to singe your eyebrows.
examples.chinese: 火焰很烫，会燎到你的眉毛。

examples.english: The rug was singed by a piece of burning coal that had fallen from the fire.
examples.chinese: 小地毯被炉火中掉出的一块燃着的煤烧焦了。

examples.english: In the cave they found some charred animal bones.
examples.chinese: 他们在洞内发现一些烧焦了的动物骨头。

examples.english: It was nearly impossible to recognize the charred bodies.
examples.chinese: 要辨认出这些烧焦了的尸体几乎是不可能的。

examples.english: Don't touch the iron. You'll burn yourself.
examples.chinese: 别碰熨斗，会烫伤你的。

examples.english: She burnt her arm on a camping stove.
examples.chinese: 她的手臂碰在野餐炉上烫伤了。

examples.english: Jerry was badly burned in the explosion.
examples.chinese: 杰里在爆炸中严重烧伤。

examples.english: The child had cigarette burns on his arms and legs.
examples.chinese: 这小孩的臂上和腿上有被香烟烫过的痕迹。

examples.english: Billy was taken to the hospital with severe burns.
examples.chinese: 比利的身体被严重烧伤，被送往医院。

examples.english: Jones suffered only minor burns when her house was set ablaze last week.
examples.chinese: 琼斯家上周被人放火，她只是轻微烧伤。

examples.english: If you're not careful you'll scald yourself on/with that kettle.
examples.chinese: 你如果不小心，就会被那个水壶烫伤。

examples.english: The hot coffee nearly scalded his tongue.
examples.chinese: 那杯热腾腾的咖啡差点烫伤了他的舌头。

expressions.text: set fire to something/set something on fire

examples.english: Vandals set fire to an empty warehouse near the docks last night.
examples.chinese: 昨夜破坏公物者放火将码头附近的一个空仓库烧毁了。

examples.english: Teresa wondered if the burning log might set fire to the curtains.
examples.chinese: 特蕾莎不知道那块燃烧的木头是否会使窗帘着火。

examples.english: The Vikings attacked villages along the coast and set them on fire.
examples.chinese: 北欧海盗袭击了沿海的村庄后将其付之一炬。

examples.english: The heat from the stove almost set the wallpaper on fire.
examples.chinese: 炉子里散发出来的热力几乎使墙纸燃烧起来。

examples.english: Ricky sat down and lit a cigarette.
examples.chinese: 里基坐下后点了一支烟。

examples.english: We searched around for twigs and fallen branches, so we could light a fire.
examples.chinese: 我们四处寻找细枝和断落的树枝来生火。

examples.english: It looked to me like someone had torched the place.
examples.chinese: 依我看是有人故意放火烧了这地方。

examples.english: The gas is ignited by an electrical spark.
examples.chinese: 一个电火花点燃了煤气。

examples.english: If the mixture proves difficult to ignite, increase the proportion of ethylene.
examples.chinese: 如果发现这混合物难以点燃，那就增加乙烯的比例。

examples.english: It took firefighters four hours to put out the blaze.
examples.chinese: 消防员用了四小时才扑灭了这场大火。

examples.english: I put out my cigarette and went back into the house.
examples.chinese: 我熄灭了香烟，回到屋内。

examples.english: She threw sand on the fire to put it out.
examples.chinese: 她把沙子倒在火上来灭火。

examples.english: Would all passengers please extinguish their cigarettes? Thank you.
examples.chinese: 请乘客把香烟熄灭，谢谢。

examples.english: He managed to extinguish the flames with his coat.
examples.chinese: 他用外套把火扑灭了。

examples.english: You have to blow out all the candles or your wish won't come true.
examples.chinese: 你得把所有蜡烛都吹灭，否则你许的愿不会实现的。

examples.english: We tried to light a fire but the wind kept blowing it out.
examples.chinese: 我们想点着火，但风不断把火吹灭。

examples.english: I grabbed a blanket and tried to smother the flames.
examples.chinese: 我抓过一条毯子想把火闷熄。

examples.english: She stubbed out her cigarette on the edge of the table.
examples.chinese: 她把烟蒂按到桌边上捻熄了。

examples.english: Don't stub your cigarette out on the floor!
examples.chinese: 别把香烟按在地板上捻熄！

examples.english: When I got back the fire had gone out.
examples.chinese: 我回来时火已熄了。

examples.english: Suddenly the candle went out.
examples.chinese: 蜡烛突然熄灭了。

examples.english: Don't let the campfire go out.
examples.chinese: 别让营火熄了。

examples.english: The fire slowly died down during the night.
examples.chinese: 夜里火势逐渐减弱。

examples.english: The barbecue won't be ready until the flames have died down and the charcoal is glowing.
examples.chinese: 要到火焰减弱、木炭发红才能开始烧烤野餐。

examples.english: Firefighters are hoping the blaze will burn itself out before dawn.
examples.chinese: 消防员希望日出前这场大火会燃尽。

examples.english: It's only a small fire - we can leave it to burn itself out.
examples.chinese: 这只是场小火，我们可以让它自己烧完。

examples.english: A pile of branches was burning in the yard.
examples.chinese: 院子里有一堆树枝在燃烧。

examples.english: At one end of the room a coal fire burned brightly.
examples.chinese: 房间的一端有一堆煤火在熊熊燃烧。

examples.english: The candle flickered briefly, then burned with a steady flame.
examples.chinese: 烛火微微摇曳不定，接着便稳定地燃烧起来。

examples.english: The smell of burning rubber filled the air.
examples.chinese: 空气中充满了烧橡胶的气味。

examples.english: He was 200 yards from the burning ship when it exploded.
examples.chinese: 船爆炸时，他离燃烧着的船200码远。

examples.english: Large areas of the forest are reported to be on fire.
examples.chinese: 据报道，大片森林在燃烧。

examples.english: Before long the neighboring houses were on fire too.
examples.chinese: 不久，邻近的房屋也都着火烧了起来。

examples.english: When the fire department arrived the whole school was in flames.
examples.chinese: 消防队赶到时，整座学校已在熊熊大火之中了。

examples.english: Twelve hours after the bombing raid, many parts of the city were still ablaze.
examples.chinese: 轰炸结束12小时后，城中许多地方仍在熊熊燃烧。

examples.english: They sat on the sofa in front of a blazing fire.
examples.chinese: 他们坐在沙发上，面对着熊熊燃烧着的炉火。

examples.english: The heat from the blazing car could be felt several metres away.
examples.chinese: 燃烧着的汽车所散发出的热力几米之外都可以感觉到。

examples.english: The fire in the chemical factory was so intense that it was still smouldering a week later.
examples.chinese: 化工厂的火非常猛烈，一周之后仍在闷燃不熄。

examples.english: A cigarette smoldered in the ashtray.
examples.chinese: 一根香烟在烟灰缸里闷燃着。

examples.english: a pile of smoldering leaves
examples.chinese: 一堆闷燃着的树叶

examples.english: A welcoming fire flickered in the grate.
examples.chinese: 壁炉里的火忽隐忽现，令人感到惬意。

examples.english: Inside the shrine candles flicker next to statues of saints.
examples.chinese: 圣殿内烛光摇曳，旁边是一尊尊圣像。

examples.english: Two farm workers died when a barn caught fire yesterday.
examples.chinese: 昨天一座谷仓着火时烧死了两名农场工人。

examples.english: The car turned over, but luckily it didn't catch fire.
examples.chinese: 汽车翻了身，幸好没起火燃烧。

examples.english: There was an explosion, and the whole garage caught on fire.
examples.chinese: 爆炸后整个车库烧了起来。

examples.english: The plane crashed into the side of the mountain and burst into flames.
examples.chinese: 飞机坠毁在山的一侧，立刻燃起了大火。

examples.english: Without warning the toaster burst into flames.
examples.chinese: 烤面包机在没有任何先兆下起火了。

examples.english: Be careful with those matches, or the whole place will go up in flames!
examples.chinese: 用那火柴要小心，不然这整个地方会被大火烧毁的！

examples.english: The fire spread slowly until it reached the gas cylinders, then the factory went up in flames.
examples.chinese: 火缓缓地蔓延到煤气瓶那里，之后整座工厂就猛烈燃烧起来。

examples.english: If the oil tanker goes up, it could burn for weeks.
examples.chinese: 如果油轮起火，就会烧几个星期。

examples.english: Over £20,000 worth of damage was caused when a fire broke out in the cellar.
examples.chinese: 酒窖突然起火，造成了两万多英镑的损失。

examples.english: Would you know what to do if a fire broke out in your school?
examples.chinese: 要是学校里失火你知道怎么办吗？

examples.english: The spilled gasoline suddenly flared up in a sheet of flame.
examples.chinese: 溢出的汽油猛地燃烧起来，霎时间一片大火。

examples.english: They threw some dry wood onto the bonfire and it flared up, showering sparks into the night sky.
examples.chinese: 他们往篝火里丢了几块干柴，火焰一下蹿了起来，火花迸入了夜空中。

examples.english: Scientists could not explain why the gas had suddenly ignited.
examples.chinese: 科学家无法解释汽油突然起火的原因。

examples.english: The compound ignites at 450 degrees Celsius.
examples.chinese: 这种混合物在摄氏450度开始燃烧。

examples.english: Charlene has lived with relatives since her house burned down.
examples.chinese: 查伦的房子被烧毁后，她就一直和亲戚住在一起。

examples.english: The hotel burnt down in 1990.
examples.chinese: 该旅馆于1990年被焚毁。

examples.english: ‘Was there anything worth saving after the fire?’ ‘No, the place is completely gutted.’
examples.chinese: “大火之后还有没有什么值得捡回的东西？”“没有，内部的东西全被烧毁了。”

examples.english: a street full of gutted buildings
examples.chinese: 满是被烧空的建筑物的街道

examples.english: A blaze gutted the dance hall last April.
examples.chinese: 去年4月份一场大火把舞厅烧了个精光。

examples.english: In the main square the burnt-out shell of the Palace of Justice still smouldered.
examples.chinese: 主广场上，内部已被烧毁的司法官仍在闷燃着。

examples.english: The van was burned-out and completely blackened by smoke.
examples.chinese: 那辆客货车内部已被烧毁，车身被烟完全熏黑了。

examples.english: Does styrofoam burn?
examples.chinese: 聚苯乙烯烧得起来吗?

examples.english: Hard woods generally don't burn well.
examples.chinese: 硬木一般都不易燃烧。

examples.english: The report stated that inflammable substances were found near the building's heating system.
examples.chinese: 报告指出在大楼取暖系统附近发现了易燃物质。

examples.english: Hydrogen is a highly flammable gas.
examples.chinese: 氢是高度易燃气体。

centers.english: something that does not burn easily

examples.english: Theatre curtains have to be fireproof.
examples.chinese: 戏院的幕布必须防火。

examples.english: Heat the mixture in a flameproof dish.
examples.chinese: 在耐火盘中把混合物加热。

examples.english: Children's pajamas are usually made from flame-resistant material.
examples.chinese: 儿童的睡衣通常用防火材料制成。

centers.english: the ability to control people and events

examples.english: Do you think the police have too much power?
examples.chinese: 你认为警察权力太大了吗?

examples.english: He was motivated by greed, envy, and the lust for power.
examples.chinese: 他受了贪婪、妒忌和权力欲的驱使。

examples.english: the enormous economic power of the United States
examples.chinese: 美国强大的经济实力

examples.english: The big Hollywood studios have a lot of power over what kind of films get made.
examples.chinese: 好莱坞的大电影制片厂有很大权力决定拍何种影片。

expressions.text: have the power to do something

examples.english: Only Parliament has the power to make new laws.
examples.chinese: 只有议会才有权制定新法律。

examples.english: A power struggle developed between the president and the generals.
examples.chinese: 总统和将军们之间产生了权力之争。

examples.english: The Catholic Church has always had a lot of influence in Polish politics.
examples.chinese: 天主教教会对波兰政治一直有很大的影响力。

examples.english: The banks had too much influence over government policy.
examples.chinese: 银行对政府政策的影响力过大。

examples.english: Using her influence with her husband, Evita Peron won women the right to vote.
examples.chinese: 埃维塔·贝隆运用对丈夫的影响力，为女性争取到了投票权。

examples.english: No one dared to question the principal's authority.
examples.chinese: 没有人敢对校长的权力提出质疑。

examples.english: In the British system, the mayor has no authority over the local police.
examples.chinese: 在英国的体制中，市长无权管辖当地警察。

expressions.text: have the authority to do something

examples.english: The King had the authority to raise taxes without the permission of parliament.
examples.chinese: 国王有权不经议会同意就增税。

examples.english: If we're going to undertake such a big project, the voters should have a say.
examples.chinese: 如果我们打算从事这么大的一项工程，选民应该有权发言。

examples.english: By giving the workers a greater say in the running of the company, we hope to increase cooperation and job satisfaction.
examples.chinese: 通过给予工人在公司管理方面更大的发言权，我们希望增进合作并提升工作满意度。

examples.english: The Prisoner Review Board can recommend that a prisoner is released, but Illinois Gov. Jim Edgar has the final say.
examples.chinese: 囚犯审查委员会可以建议释放一名犯人，但伊利诺伊州州长吉姆·埃德加拥有最后决定权。

examples.english: The government has for years been trying to destroy the muscle of the trade unions.
examples.chinese: 数年来，政府一直在试图摧毁工会的力量。

expressions.text: have the muscle to do something

examples.english: Hanson Trust has the muscle to buy up some of America's biggest companies.
examples.chinese: 汉森信托基金有实力买下美国一些最大的公司。

examples.english: The Republicans do not have the political muscle to prevent the treaty being rejected by Congress.
examples.chinese: 共和党没有足够的政治实力来防止国会否决该条约。

examples.english: The banks do not carry quite as much clout as they used to.
examples.chinese: 银行的势力已不如从前。

examples.english: Doctors have considerably more political clout than teachers.
examples.chinese: 医生的政治影响力要比教师大得多。

examples.english: In general, the American courts have no jurisdiction to deal with crimes outside the USA.
examples.chinese: 一般来说，美国法院对本国之外的犯罪行为不具有裁决权。

examples.english: The Air Transit Authority's jurisdiction extends beyond the airport itself to include warehouses and associated buildings.
examples.chinese: 空运管理局的管辖权超越了机场本身，还包括仓库和相关建筑。

examples.english: The council has no jurisdiction over these matters.
examples.chinese: 议会无权管这些事情。

examples.english: It's not within our jurisdiction to tell people what to do in the privacy of their own homes.
examples.chinese: 我们无权管辖人们在家私下该干些什么。

examples.english: The courts said the claim raised ‘political questions’ that were outside its jurisdiction.
examples.chinese: 法院称这一要求提出了“政治问题”，这超出其管辖范围。

examples.english: Parliament had become more powerful than the King.
examples.chinese: 议会的权力已变得比国王更大了。

examples.english: one of the most powerful men in US politics
examples.chinese: 美国政坛势力最强的男子之一

examples.english: Berlusconi was the owner of a powerful media empire.
examples.chinese: 贝卢斯科尼拥有一个势力强大的媒体王国。

examples.english: Her uncle is a rich and influential businessman.
examples.chinese: 她叔叔是个有影响力的富商。

examples.english: She is probably the most influential member of the finance committee.
examples.chinese: 她也许是财政委员会中最具影响力的人物。

examples.english: an influential film critic
examples.chinese: 一位有影响力的影评人

examples.english: Galbraith was a highly influential writer on economic affairs.
examples.chinese: 加尔布雷思是一位对经济事务极具影响力的作家。

examples.english: The communists were particularly strong in the big industrial cities.
examples.chinese: 共产党人在大工业城市中势力特别大。

examples.english: There has been a strong anti-nuclear movement in Japan for many years.
examples.chinese: 影响广泛的反核运动在日本持续了多年。

examples.english: Gradually, Microsoft became the dominant company in the software business
examples.chinese: 微软公司渐渐成为软件行业的头号公司。

examples.english: At the time Portugal was the dominant naval power in the Mediterranean.
examples.chinese: 当时，葡萄牙海军称雄于地中海。

examples.english: The all-powerful central committee meets twice a year.
examples.chinese: 拥有最高权力的中央委员会一年开两次会。

examples.english: Catherine the Great, the all-powerful ruler of the Russian Empire
examples.chinese: 叶卡捷琳娜大帝，俄罗斯帝国至高无上的统治者

examples.english: Hollywood stars of the 30s were in awe of the all-powerful studio bosses.
examples.chinese: 30年代的好莱坞明星敬畏权力无边的制片公司老板。

examples.english: Bowen had friends in high places, and managed to raise large sums of money from the Carnegie and Rockefeller Foundations.
examples.chinese: 鲍恩有门路，能从卡内基和洛克菲勒基金会筹集到大笔资金。

examples.english: The Achym family had friends in high places, including the powerful Lord Burghley, and were allowed to return.
examples.chinese: 阿奇姆一家有位高权重的朋友，包括伯利勋爵，所以获准回来。

centers.english: a country that has a lot of power

examples.english: The United States had replaced Great Britain as the dominant world power.
examples.chinese: 美国取代英国成为了头号世界强国。

examples.english: China is regaining its place as a world power, a status it enjoyed for 3,000 years and lost only a few centuries ago.
examples.chinese: 中国正在重新取得世界大国的地位，这个位子她已坐了3,000年，只是几个世纪前才失去。

examples.english: The United States, as the world's only remaining superpower, must continue making arms control a central element of its foreign policy.
examples.chinese: 美国作为世界唯一现存的超级大国，必须继续把军备控制作为其对外政策的中心点。

examples.english: He hinted at a bigger presence for the U.S. military in the Asian Pacific region where China is emerging as a superpower.
examples.chinese: 他暗示美国军队将较大规模部署在亚太地区，在那里中国正渐渐成为超级大国。

centers.english: to have an official position of power

examples.english: The Socialists have been in power since the 1965 revolution.
examples.chinese: 自1965年革命以来，社会党一直掌权。

examples.english: The Congress Party in India lost its legislative majority in the late 1970s after nearly thirty years in power.
examples.chinese: 20世纪70年代后期，印度国大党掌权近三十年后失去了议会多数席位。

examples.english: Gorbachev could not have remained in power without the support of the Red Army.
examples.chinese: 他要是没有军队的支持是无法掌权的。

examples.english: My mother demanded to speak to someone in authority.
examples.chinese: 母亲要求同管事的人说话。

examples.english: Problems arise when people in authority can't keep discipline.
examples.chinese: 当权者无法维持秩序时麻烦来了。

examples.english: The decision was made to remove the President after 30 years in office.
examples.chinese: 已决定将已在位30年的总统免职。

examples.english: Hayward has expressed his willingness to continue in office.
examples.chinese: 海沃德已表示愿意继续任职。

examples.english: In 1860, Italy was a collection of small states ruled by princes and dukes.
examples.chinese: 1860年，意大利分裂成一些亲王、公爵统治的小城邦。

examples.english: While they ruled, the country remained isolated from the rest of the world.
examples.chinese: 在他们执政时期，该国与外部世界完全隔离。

examples.english: The Pol Pot regime ruled Cambodia from 1974 to 1978.
examples.chinese: 1974至1978年间波尔布特政府统治柬埔寨。

examples.english: Spain ruled over Portugal from 1580 to 1640.
examples.chinese: 1580至1640年间西班牙统治葡萄牙。

examples.english: Motamid had died, leaving his son Mostain to rule over Saragossa.
examples.chinese: 莫塔米德死了，留下儿子莫斯坦恩统治萨拉戈萨。

examples.english: British rule in India came to an end in 1947.
examples.chinese: 1947年英国对印度的统治结束。

examples.english: The ruling party is confident of winning the election.
examples.chinese: 执政党自信能在选举中获胜。

examples.english: the struggle between the workers and the ruling classes
examples.chinese: 工人与统治阶级之间的斗争

examples.english: The crisis sparked after the ruling party rushed through revisions of the labor and national security laws in a semi-secret parliamentary session.
examples.chinese: 执政党在议会半公开会议上匆匆修订劳动与国家安全法，触发了危机。

examples.english: Robert II reigned for 19 years and died in Dundonald Castle on 13th May, 1390.
examples.chinese: 罗伯特二世在位19年，于1390年5月13日在邓唐纳德堡去世。

examples.english: The last Moorish king reigned there until 1492.
examples.chinese: 最后一位摩尔国王在那里一直统治到1492年。

examples.english: Penda was king from 633 to 655, but it is not known who had reigned over the Mercians in the period before.
examples.chinese: 633至655年彭达为国王，但此前是谁统治麦西亚人则不得而知。

examples.english: Important reforms were initiated during the reign of Nicholas II.
examples.chinese: 重大改革起始于尼古拉二世在位时期。

examples.english: When Mrs Thatcher came to power in 1979, no one expected her to stay there for 13 years.
examples.chinese: 撒切尔夫人1979年上台时，没有人会料到她一干就是13年。

examples.english: After coming to power, President Clinton tried to resolve the conflict.
examples.chinese: 克林顿总统执政后试图解决冲突。

examples.english: Less than three weeks after Labour took office, an economic crisis developed.
examples.chinese: 工党上台不到三个星期，经济危机就发生了。

examples.english: When Olson took office in January 1939, he was the state's first Democratic governor in forty years.
examples.chinese: 1939年1月，奥尔森就职，他是40年来该州第一位民主党人州长。

examples.english: The Bolsheviks took power in 1917.
examples.chinese: 布尔什维克于1917年夺取政权。

examples.english: General da Souza had the intention of taking power through a coup d'etat.
examples.chinese: 达·苏萨将军意欲发动政变来夺权。

examples.english: The Czar was overthrown when the revolutionaries seized power.
examples.chinese: 沙皇被推翻，革命党人夺取了政权。

examples.english: A revolutionary government took over, featuring a reorganized council.
examples.chinese: 革命政府接管了政权，重新改组的议会是它的特点。

examples.english: The authorities began to make the necessary arrangements for taking over the garrisons, which were still in the hands of the enemy.
examples.chinese: 政府开始为接管卫戍部队作必要的准备工作，目前他们仍在敌军手中。

examples.english: Blocked by the Democrats in the Senate, Bush appeared powerless.
examples.chinese: 由于在参议院遭到民主党人的阻挠，布什显得无能为力。

examples.english: The people of Hungary were powerless against the tanks of the Red Army.
examples.chinese: 民众无力对抗坦克。

examples.english: The UN was powerless to prevent the war spreading.
examples.chinese: 联合国无力阻止战火蔓延。

examples.english: These policies failed because the government was weak and ineffective.
examples.chinese: 这些政策失败了，因为政府软弱无力。

examples.english: a weak, indecisive principal
examples.chinese: 一位软弱、优柔寡断的校长

examples.english: The King's mercy towards the rebels was regarded as a sign of weakness.
examples.chinese: 国王对叛军的宽容被视为软弱的象征。

examples.english: Whenever we have to make an important decision, I feel that I have no say.
examples.chinese: 每当我们作重大决定时，我都感觉自己没有发言权。

examples.english: The French government allows the Annamese almost no say at all in running their affairs.
examples.chinese: 法国政府在管理安南人的事务上独断专行，几乎不给予他们任何发言权。

examples.english: The company has spent millions of dollars replacing outdated computer hardware.
examples.chinese: 该公司花费数百万美元更换过时的电脑硬件。

examples.english: The information from the survey is being processed by computer.
examples.chinese: 调查获得的信息正在由电脑处理。

examples.english: I can't get the program to work on my computer.
examples.chinese: 我的电脑上该程序无法启动。

examples.english: How long are you going to be on the computer? I need to type something.
examples.chinese: 你需要用电脑多长时间？我得打些字。

examples.english: It is important that all children become computer literate while they are in school.
examples.chinese: 所有的小孩子在学校里学会用电脑是很重要的。

examples.english: Sales of PCs were down for the second year running.
examples.chinese: 个人电脑销量连续两年下跌。

examples.english: I think there's something wrong with my machine - would you take a look at it?
examples.chinese: 我觉得我的电脑有问题—你来看看好吗？

examples.english: I have to share my workstation with two other people in the office.
examples.chinese: 我必须与办公室另两位同事合用电脑。

examples.english: Her boss's laptop got stolen from her car.
examples.chinese: 她老板的笔记本电脑被人从她车里偷走了。

examples.english: Most workplaces have a local network as well as access to the Internet.
examples.chinese: 大多数工作场所既有局域网又能上互联网。

examples.english: You need special software to view the information in the file.
examples.chinese: 你需要有特别软件来查看该文件的内容。

examples.english: The company develops interactive software for schoolchildren.
examples.chinese: 该公司开发适用于学童的互动软件。

examples.english: India's software industry barely existed 15 years ago but is growing rapidly today.
examples.chinese: 15年前，印度几乎没有软件工业，但现在正飞速发展。

examples.english: I didn't have enough memory on my computer to run the program.
examples.chinese: 我的电脑内存不够运行该程序。

examples.english: She was writing simple computer programs when she was eight years old.
examples.chinese: 她八岁时编写简单的电脑程序。

examples.english: I seem to have lost the file with all my personal records on it.
examples.chinese: 看来我把记录我所有个人信息的那个文件弄丢了。

examples.english: Just click on the icon to open the file.
examples.chinese: 点击该图标就能打开那个文件。

examples.english: It's a good idea to save your files to a floppy disk as a backup.
examples.chinese: 将文件储存到软盘上作为备份是个好主意。

examples.english: a graphics application
examples.chinese: 一种图形应用程序

examples.english: an interactive education package for 7-10-year-olds
examples.chinese: 面向7至10岁儿童的互动教育软件套装

examples.english: When designing your site, think about whether it needs to be interactive or informational.
examples.chinese: 设计网站时，想一想要做互动的还是做信息量大的。

examples.english: The virtual tour includes multimedia displays demonstrating how the market works.
examples.chinese: 虚拟旅行包括展现市场运作的多媒体展示。

examples.english: Most computer users do not realize how much their computers can do.
examples.chinese: 大多数电脑用户不知道电脑的功能有多大。

examples.english: Users often complain that the Internet is slow and unreliable.
examples.chinese: 电脑用户常抱怨互联网速度慢且不可靠。

examples.english: The program is remarkably user-friendly and can be learned by anyone.
examples.chinese: 该程序操作极其简单，人人都能学会使用。

examples.english: Computer programmers are in great demand, and a good one can earn a very high salary.
examples.chinese: 电脑程序设计师需求量很大，优秀人员的薪酬极高。

examples.english: I don't even bother trying to fix things that go wrong on my computer - I leave that to the techies.
examples.chinese: 我不会费劲去修电脑的—我把它留给技术人员。

examples.english: Hackers broke into the Pentagon's security system last night.
examples.chinese: 昨晚有黑客闯入五角大楼的安保系统。

examples.english: Software developers need to be aware that not all users are technical experts.
examples.chinese: 软件开发者得知道，并非所有用户都是技术专家。

examples.english: His first job as a systems analyst was to reorganize they way the store's stock was recorded.
examples.chinese: 他当系统分析师的第一个任务是重新组织商店存货的记录方式。

examples.english: If you're not prepared to pay for adequate IT support, it's no wonder you lose so much time through computer problems.
examples.chinese: 如果不愿意聘请充足的电脑维修人员，在电脑故障上浪费大量时间不足为奇。

centers.english: things you do with a computer

examples.english: When you have entered your credit card information, go to the next screen.
examples.chinese: 输入信用卡资料后，进入下一页。

examples.english: Copy the files into a new folder.
examples.chinese: 将这些文件复制到新文件夹中。

examples.english: Save your work and close down any applications that are open.
examples.chinese: 储存手头的工作并关闭所有打开的应用程序。

examples.english: Delete any files that end in ‘.tmp’.
examples.chinese: 删除所有文件名结尾是“.tmp”的文件。

examples.english: To create parallel columns, press Alt-F7 and select option 4.
examples.chinese: 要创建新平行栏，按Alt-F7并选取选项4。

examples.english: Scroll down to see when the website was last updated.
examples.chinese: 往下移，看看该网站最后更新日期。

examples.english: I did a search for any articles by Varenqe on the web, and I found quite a few.
examples.chinese: 我在网上搜寻瓦雷克写的文章，找到不少。

examples.english: To find a book on our site, you can search by author, title, or subject.
examples.chinese: 在我们网站上找书可以通过作者、书名或主题查找。

examples.english: You can search the document for particular words or phrases, in order to get directly to the information you need.
examples.chinese: 你可以在文件中搜寻单词或短语，以便直接获取所需信息。

examples.english: Open the file called Templates.
examples.chinese: 打开文件模板。

examples.english: Close all applications before shutting down your computer.
examples.chinese: 关闭电脑前退出所有的应用程序。

examples.english: Click on ‘next’ when you have finished filling out the form.
examples.chinese: 填妥表格后点击“下一步”。

examples.english: It's easier if you just cut and paste the information from one page to another.
examples.chinese: 将内容从一页剪下贴到另一页比较方便。

examples.english: To delete a block of text, highlight it and then press Del.
examples.chinese: 要删除一块文字，先将它突出显示，然后按“删除”键。

examples.english: You can delete the files by dragging them into your ‘trash’ folder.
examples.chinese: 可将文件拖进“垃圾箱”文件夹将其删除。

examples.english: A criminal gang hacked into a credit card company's most secure files.
examples.chinese: 一个犯罪集团侵入了一家信用卡公司的绝密档案系统。

examples.english: Log on to our website and find out about the latest travel deals to the Far East.
examples.chinese: 请登录我们的网站，查找去远东旅游的最新优惠。

examples.english: When I logged off, the whole system froze up.
examples.chinese: 我退出时，整个系统死机了。

examples.english: The anti-virus icon should appear whenever you start up your computer.
examples.chinese: 只要一开机就会有杀毒软件的图标出现。

examples.english: Just wait a couple of minutes while the computer boots up.
examples.chinese: 电脑启动时等一两分钟吧。

examples.english: If a program crashes you usually have to reboot the computer.
examples.chinese: 如果程序崩溃，一般得重新启动电脑。

examples.english: I'm always forgetting to shut down my computer before I go home.
examples.chinese: 回家前我老是忘记关闭电脑。

examples.english: Please enter your username and password.
examples.chinese: 请输入用户名和密码。

examples.english: Don't let anyone know your password.
examples.chinese: 别让别人知道你的密码。

centers.english: to put information or a program into a computer
centers.chinese: 将信息或程序输入电脑

examples.english: We put all these details into our computer, and it chooses a suitable partner for you.
examples.chinese: 我们将所有这些细节输入电脑，它会为你选择合适的伴侣。

examples.english: The quality of output data will depend on the data you have put in.
examples.chinese: 输出数据的质量取决于输入的数据。

examples.english: The user inputs the data, and the computer stores it in its memory.
examples.chinese: 用户输入数据，电脑便将这些东西储存在内存中。

examples.english: We're currently inputting the names and addresses of all our customers into a database.
examples.chinese: 眼下我们在将所有客户的姓名和地址输进数据库。

examples.english: Enter the amount of money you wish to take out of your account.
examples.chinese: 请输入提款金额。

examples.english: If a word is entered incorrectly the machine refuses to obey the command.
examples.chinese: 如果有单词输入不正确，机器便会拒绝接受指令。

examples.english: LOAD is a command which loads a new program from the file.
examples.chinese: “读取”是从文件中将新程序载入电脑的指令。

examples.english: The program can be encoded on the disk's surface and then loaded into the microprocessor.
examples.chinese: 该程序先在磁盘表面加密，然后载入微处理器中。

examples.english: My computer crashed, and we couldn't get it working again.
examples.chinese: 我的电脑崩溃了，无法再启动。

examples.english: The screen froze up, it crashed, and I lost all my work.
examples.chinese: 屏幕静止不动，电脑崩溃，我所做的都没有了。

examples.english: Our computers are down right now, could you call back in an hour?
examples.chinese: 我们的电脑眼下都瘫痪了，你过一小时再打电话来好吗?

examples.english: The whole network went down without any warning.
examples.chinese: 整个网络没有任何征兆就瘫痪了。

examples.english: Some bug in the program meant when I typed in a letter I got a number instead.
examples.chinese: 这个程序有错误，也就是说，我输入字母却出现数字。

examples.english: A warning has gone out about a new virus that could wipe everything off your hard disk.
examples.chinese: 出现一个警告说，有种新病毒会清除掉硬盘上的所有东西。

examples.english: You cannot get a virus from an email message alone.
examples.chinese: 单收到电子邮件是不可能染上病毒的。

examples.english: Whenever I try to enter the data the computer gives me an error window.
examples.chinese: 只要我输入数据，电脑就会弹出错误窗口。

examples.english: a corrupted file
examples.chinese: 一个坏文件

examples.english: Some segments of your hard drive are corrupt.
examples.chinese: 你的硬盘有些区损坏了。

centers.english: the Internet and places on the Internet

examples.english: The Internet makes it possible for people all over the world to keep in touch.
examples.chinese: 互联网使世界各地的人能保持联络。

examples.english: In theory, the Net should make things quicker, but that isn't always the case.
examples.chinese: 理论上，互联网能提高效率，但事情往往不是这样。

examples.english: She spends nearly all her free time on the Internet.
examples.chinese: 她的所有闲暇时间几乎都用来上网了。

examples.english: The couple met on the Internet.
examples.chinese: 这对夫妇是在网上认识的。

examples.english: The city's libraries provide free Internet access.
examples.chinese: 市图书馆提供免费上网。

examples.english: E-commerce was then seen as a booming economic area.
examples.chinese: 电子商务那时被视为日趋繁荣的经济领域。

examples.english: Cyber-crime, for example the fraudulent use of credit cards on the net, presents particular problems for the police.
examples.chinese: 网络犯罪，如网上信用卡诈骗等给警方提出了特别的难题。

examples.english: He seems to spend all his time in cyberspace!
examples.chinese: 他似乎把所有时间都花在网络空间上了！

examples.english: The business world was shaken by the huge drop in dotcom shares.
examples.chinese: 商界因互联网公司股票价格猛跌而受到震动。

examples.english: dotcom jobs
examples.chinese: 网络公司的职位

examples.english: Visit our website on www.stellamary.UK.
examples.chinese: 请光临我们的网站www.stellamary.UK。

examples.english: Do you want me to print off this web page?
examples.chinese: 你想让我把这个网页打印下来吗？

examples.english: You can reach all the other pages on a website from its home page.
examples.chinese: 从一个网站的主页上能进入它的所有其他页面。

examples.english: Children should be taught to be careful about who they talk to in chat rooms.
examples.chinese: 应当教会孩子在聊天室里小心对方。

examples.english: For more info, click on this link.
examples.chinese: 想获得更多信息，点击此链接。

examples.english: This search engine will only find sites that originate in Europe.
examples.chinese: 这个搜索引擎只能找到欧洲的网站。

examples.english: My browser really is incredibly slow.
examples.chinese: 我的浏览器真的是出奇地慢。

examples.english: Before e-mailing us, it might be advisable to click on FAQ first.
examples.chinese: 给我们发电邮之前，建议先点击常见问题。

examples.english: I'll just go online and look up her address.
examples.chinese: 我就去网上查她的地址。

examples.english: The official World Cup web-site scored a record number of hits last week.
examples.chinese: 世界杯官方网站上周的点击数创下了纪录。

centers.english: things you do on the Internet

examples.english: People caught surfing the Net at work are liable to be dismissed.
examples.chinese: 上班时间在网上冲浪被逮住的人可予以开除。

examples.english: Download your favorite songs by clicking here.
examples.chinese: 点击此处下载自己喜欢的歌曲。

examples.english: Take great care when uploading personal information such as your address or credit card number.
examples.chinese: 上传地址、信用卡号码等个人资料要格外小心。

examples.english: For more information on how you can help, visit our website.
examples.chinese: 如需了解更多自己如何协助的信息，请访问我们的网站。

examples.english: You can chat to Brad Pitt live this evening.
examples.chinese: 今晚你可以与布拉德·皮特在网上实时交谈。

examples.english: Teenagers are the group most likely to IM each other.
examples.chinese: 青少年是最有可能用即时信息相互交谈的群体。

examples.english: Email has revolutionized the way we all think and work.
examples.chinese: 电子邮件使我们大家的思考和工作方式发生彻底变革。

examples.english: Give me your email address and I'll send you directions to the party.
examples.chinese: 告诉我你的电邮地址，我会告诉你去聚会的路怎么走。

examples.english: I sent him an email two weeks ago, but I haven't heard anything back.
examples.chinese: 两个星期前我给他发了一封电邮，但没有任何回音。

examples.english: We'd been emailing each other for six months before we actually met.
examples.chinese: 我们亲身见面之前相互间用电子邮件联系了六个月。

examples.english: I'll email you my résumé when I get home.
examples.chinese: 我回到家就把简历用电子邮件发给你。

examples.english: Sorry about the snailmail - my email's not working.
examples.chinese: 对不起我用普通邮件寄出，我的电邮坏了。

examples.english: I'm sending the document as an attachment. Please let me know if you have trouble reading it.
examples.chinese: 我将此文件以附件形式发送，你阅读若有问题请告诉我。

examples.english: I've attached the latest spreadsheet for you to look at.
examples.chinese: 我已附上最新的电子数据表给你审阅。

examples.english: Flaming your boss really isn't a good idea, however angry you are.
examples.chinese: 不管你有多么生气，在网上怒骂老板实在不是个好主意。

examples.english: I was getting so much spam mail that I changed my email address.
examples.chinese: 我收到太多的垃圾电邮，于是更改了电邮地址。

examples.english: She tried to mail him several times but the message always bounced.
examples.chinese: 她试着给他发了几次电邮，但邮件一直自动弹回。

centers.english: things you use for doing something

examples.english: You should check all your electrical equipment regularly.
examples.chinese: 你应该定期检查所有的电器。

examples.english: high technology equipment for policing and traffic control
examples.chinese: 用以治安管理和交通管制的高科技设备

examples.english: Thieves stole all the video equipment from the college.
examples.chinese: 窃贼盗走了学院里所有的录像设备。

examples.english: We were told to keep all our sports equipment in the lockers downstairs.
examples.chinese: 我们被告知，把所有运动器材存放到楼下的锁柜里。

examples.english: It's much easier if you have the right piece of equipment for the job.
examples.chinese: 这工作要是有合适的设备，做起来会容易很多。

examples.english: The plumber went back out to the van to get his tools.
examples.chinese: 管道工回到外面的货车上去拿工具。

examples.english: As a writer, I don't need any tools, apart from my computer and the internet.
examples.chinese: 作为作家，除了电脑和互联网，我不需要什么工具。

examples.english: For a salesman, a cheap suit and a Ford Escort are the traditional tools of the trade.
examples.chinese: 干推销员这一行，一套便宜的西装和一辆福特护卫者汽车一向是必不可少的。

examples.english: This experiment can be performed using the apparatus shown in the diagram.
examples.chinese: 这个实验可用图中显示的装置进行。

examples.english: Astronauts have special breathing apparatus.
examples.chinese: 宇航员有特殊的呼吸装置。

examples.english: There's a shop in town which sells all the latest photographic apparatus.
examples.chinese: 镇上有一家商店出售各种最新的摄影器材。

examples.english: Now, have you got all your things ready?
examples.chinese: 好了，你的东西都准备好了吗?

examples.english: Don't forget to bring your swimming things with you.
examples.chinese: 别忘了带游泳的东西。

examples.english: At 8.30 we loaded all our gear into the boat, and cruised out to a spot a few miles offshore.
examples.chinese: 8点30分，我们把所有装备都装到船上，然后朝着离岸几英里的一个地方驶去。

examples.english: Have you got all your football gear?
examples.chinese: 你的足球装备都齐了吗？

examples.english: The soldiers were wearing heavy combat gear and travelling in convoys.
examples.chinese: 士兵们身穿重甲，坐在护送车队中。

examples.english: Always take a first-aid kit with you when you go camping.
examples.chinese: 去露营一定要带急救箱。

examples.english: You should never go cycling without a basic repair kit.
examples.chinese: 如果没有基本的修理工具，千万别去骑自行车。

examples.english: The builders have left all their stuff round the back of the house.
examples.chinese: 建筑工人把他们所有的东西都留在屋后四周。

examples.english: Our camping stuff alone took up most of the space in the back of the car.
examples.chinese: 单是我们露营用的东西就占了汽车后部的大部分地方。

examples.english: a machine that fills beer bottles
examples.chinese: 一台给啤酒瓶装啤酒的机器

examples.english: One cable was damaged, which was causing the machine to shut down frequently.
examples.chinese: 有一根电缆受损，造成机器经常关闭。

examples.english: There is a washing machine in the basement of the building.
examples.chinese: 大楼的地下室里有台洗衣机。

examples.english: It's possible to operate the machines by remote control.
examples.chinese: 用遥控器来操作这几台机器是可能的。

examples.english: Ice could be made in huge quantities by machine.
examples.chinese: 可以用机器制出大量的冰。

examples.english: An EEG is a device that records electrical activity in the brain.
examples.chinese: 脑电图仪是一种记录脑电活动的仪器。

examples.english: a device for controlling temperature
examples.chinese: 一种控温装置

examples.english: The farmers there still use the ‘Archimedes Screw’, an ancient device for raising water from a lake or well.
examples.chinese: 那里的农民仍然使用“阿基米德螺旋泵”，一种把水从湖里或井里抽上来的古老装置。

examples.english: They were both aware that there might be listening devices hidden in the room.
examples.chinese: 他们俩都意识到房间里可能藏匿了监听装置。

examples.english: The National Association for Elevator Safety says that most elevators have safety devices that prevent free-falls.
examples.chinese: 国家电梯安全协会说大多数电梯都有防止自由坠落的安全装置。

examples.english: With the flick of a switch, the robot picks up the bomb, carries it away from buildings, and blows it up.
examples.chinese: 一按开关，机器人就捡起炸弹，把它搬离建筑物，然后引爆。

examples.english: One astronaut used the space shuttle's robot arm to pick up an 1800-pound satellite from space.
examples.chinese: 一名宇航员使用航天飞机上的机器人臂来抓起太空中重1,800磅的人造卫星。

examples.english: People are spending more of their income on goods such as cars and appliances.
examples.chinese: 人们把收入的更多部分用来购买汽车和电器设备之类的商品。

examples.english: To make it easier to return any unwanted purchases, save the original packaging, especially for electronics and household appliances.
examples.chinese: 购买商品以后，为便于把不要的商品退回，请把原包装保存好，尤其是电子产品和家电产品的原包装。

examples.english: The package says you shouldn't drive or operate heavy machinery after taking these pills.
examples.chinese: 包装上说服用此药片后不可开车或操作重型机器。

examples.english: Industrial machinery and electronic equipment lead the nation's export list.
examples.chinese: 工业机械设备和电子设备是该国首屈一指的出口类商品。

examples.english: a company that manufactures farm machinery
examples.chinese: 一家生产农用机器的公司

examples.english: The mechanism that raises the bridge was not working correctly.
examples.chinese: 升起桥梁的机械装置出了毛病。

examples.english: Unfortunately, the water had damaged the firing mechanism inside the rocket.
examples.chinese: 不幸的是水把火箭内部的发射装置损坏了。

examples.english: The garlic press uses a screw mechanism to squeeze out juice and pulp.
examples.chinese: 榨蒜器用一个螺旋装置榨出蒜汁和蒜肉。

examples.english: Early cameras were large and expensive contraptions.
examples.chinese: 早期的相机体积大、价钱贵，是一种样子很古怪的机械装置。

examples.english: By demonstrating his floating contraption - part surfboard, part kayak and part sailboard - Halfon hopes to create a tide of attention.
examples.chinese: 通过展示那个又像冲浪板，又像轻型独木舟，又像帆板的浮水的怪物，哈尔丰期望能引来众人的目光。

centers.english: a thing that produces power for a machine or vehicle
centers.chinese: 为机器或车辆提供动力的东西

examples.english: Every time I try to start the engine, there's a strange knocking sound.
examples.chinese: 我每次要发动引擎时，它就会发出奇怪的敲击声。

examples.english: She left the car in the drive with the engine still running.
examples.chinese: 她把汽车停在车道上，发动机仍然开着。

examples.english: The SVT is available only with a six-cylinder engine.
examples.chinese: 这种SVT汽车只有六汽缸的型号。

examples.english: Some residents fear the crops would attract birds that might be sucked into jet engines.
examples.chinese: 一些居民担心这些农作物会引来鸟类，鸟可能会被吸到喷气式引擎里去。

examples.english: For next year, the company will offer three cars with turbocharged diesel engines in the United States.
examples.chinese: 明年，该公司将在美国推出三款涡轮增压的柴油发动机汽车。

examples.english: Just then, the motor failed and the boat began drifting out of control.
examples.chinese: 就在那一刻马达失灵了，小艇开始失控地随波漂流。

examples.english: The ceiling fan is powered by an electric motor.
examples.chinese: 这台吊扇由一个电动马达驱动。

centers.english: relating to or done by machines
centers.chinese: 与机器有关或由机器完成的

examples.english: In a bakery, the bread is rarely kneaded by hand but by large mechanical mixers.
examples.chinese: 在面包房里，揉面这工作很少用手来做，而是由大型机械搅拌器来完成的。

examples.english: A mechanical problem may be to blame for the crash.
examples.chinese: 这次失事可能是由机械故障引起的。

examples.english: Flemma said that a reliable mechanical device was needed for the thousands of patients who die while awaiting human heart transplants.
examples.chinese: 弗莱玛说有成千上万的病人在等待做心脏移植手术时死去了，因此需要一台性能可靠的机械设备。

examples.english: The bones can be removed mechanically before the birds are packaged for sale.
examples.chinese: 将禽鸟包装出售前可用机械将骨头剔除。

examples.english: Automatic lights had come on in various parts of the house.
examples.chinese: 屋子里各处都有自动灯亮起。

examples.english: The camera has a 32mm glass lens, and its automatic shutter allows you to take photos in near-darkness without a flash.
examples.chinese: 这台照相机有一个32毫米的玻璃镜头，其自动快门能够在不使用闪光灯的情况下在光线很暗时拍出照片。

examples.english: The soldiers lay on the highway with their automatic rifles beside them.
examples.chinese: 士兵们趴在高速公路上，身边放着自动步枪。

examples.english: The doors open automatically when you go near them.
examples.chinese: 当你靠近时这些门会自动打开。

examples.english: He couldn't finish repairing the engine because he didn't have the right tools.
examples.chinese: 他无法修好引擎，因为他没有合适的工具。

examples.english: a tool for cutting metal
examples.chinese: 切割金属的工具

examples.english: All my gardening tools had been stolen from the shed.
examples.chinese: 我所有的园艺工具都被人从棚屋偷走了。

examples.english: He took a spanner from his tool box and tightened up the bolts on the gate.
examples.chinese: 他从工具箱里拿了把扳手把大门上的螺栓拧紧。

examples.english: A good tool kit should contain pliers, screwdrivers, and wire-cutters.
examples.chinese: 一套合用的工具应该包括手钳、螺丝刀和钢丝钳。

examples.english: I sat in the dentist's chair and looked at the row of instruments beside me.
examples.chinese: 我坐在牙医诊所的椅子上，看着在我旁边的一排器械。

examples.english: The microscope is perhaps the most widely used scientific instrument.
examples.chinese: 显微镜也许是使用最广的科学仪器。

examples.english: The company specializes in the manufacture of high quality writing instruments.
examples.chinese: 这家公司专门生产高质量的书写工具。

examples.english: He showed her several electronic gadgets, such as a watch that you can use as a phone.
examples.chinese: 他给她看了几种电子小装置，例如可以当电话用的手表。

examples.english: It's a clever little gadget which you can use to cut vegetables into attractive shapes.
examples.chinese: 那是一种设计得很精巧的小器具，可以用来把蔬菜切成漂亮的形状。

examples.english: A sales assistant was demonstrating several kitchen gadgets to a crowd of shoppers.
examples.chinese: 一名销售员正向一群顾客展示几种厨房小器具。

examples.english: An EEG is a device that records electrical activity in the brain.
examples.chinese: 脑电图仪是记录大脑电流活动的仪器。

examples.english: a thermostatic device for controlling temperature
examples.chinese: 一种用来控制温度的恒温装置

examples.english: The farmers there still use the ‘Archimedes Screw’, an ancient device for raising water from a lake or well.
examples.chinese: 那里的农民仍在使用“阿基米德螺旋管”，那是古时一种从湖里或井里打水的装置。

examples.english: The native women grind the wheat with heavy stone implements.
examples.chinese: 本地妇女用沉重的石器来碾小麦。

examples.english: It is best to cut weeds off at the roots with an implement such as a hoe.
examples.chinese: 最好用锄头之类的农具把杂草连根割除。

examples.english: Some children find it difficult to hold their writing implements.
examples.chinese: 有些小孩觉得很难握住他们的书写工具。

examples.english: Peter found the potato peeler in a drawer full of utensils.
examples.chinese: 彼得在一个放满了厨房用具的抽屉里找到了马铃薯削皮器。

examples.english: We packed a few essential cooking utensils such as pots and a can opener for our camping trip.
examples.chinese: 我们为野营旅行准备了锅、开罐刀等几种必须的烹调用具。

examples.english: You will find a wide range of kitchen utensils in our cookshop on the second floor.
examples.chinese: 二楼的炊具部有各种各样的厨具。

examples.english: The men were finally persuaded to come out and hand over their weapons to the police.
examples.chinese: 那帮人最终被说服走出来，将武器交给警方。

examples.english: The three men had blackened faces and were carrying weapons.
examples.chinese: 三名男子涂黑了脸，手里拿着武器。

examples.english: Police have not yet found the murder weapon.
examples.chinese: 警方还没有找到凶器。

examples.english: He was arrested by police and charged with carrying an offensive weapon.
examples.chinese: 他遭警方逮捕，被控携带攻击性武器。

examples.english: a treaty to reduce the number of nuclear weapons
examples.chinese: 减少核武器数量的条约

examples.english: European governments have been supplying arms to the rebels.
examples.chinese: 欧洲各国政府一直为叛乱分子提供武器。

examples.english: Only certain members of the police force are allowed to carry arms.
examples.chinese: 只有某些警察可以携带武器。

examples.english: The government has called on the terrorists to lay down their arms.
examples.chinese: 政府要求恐怖分子放下武器。

examples.english: The two countries have just signed a new agreement on arms control.
examples.chinese: 两国刚签署了一份新的军备控制协议。

examples.english: The soldiers kept on firing until they had no more ammunition.
examples.chinese: 士兵不断射击，直到弹药全部用完。

examples.english: The terrorist group is believed to have significant quantities of guns, ammunition, and explosives.
examples.chinese: 据信恐怖组织拥有大量枪支、弹药和炸药。

examples.english: We now knew that we were trapped, with only a few rounds of ammunition left.
examples.chinese: 我们现在知道自己被困住了，只剩下几发子弹。

examples.english: It is a highly-trained army, with very sophisticated modern weaponry.
examples.chinese: 这是一支受过良好训练的军队，拥有非常精良的现代武器。

examples.english: Many of the world's poorer countries are now beginning to invest in nuclear weaponry.
examples.chinese: 世界上许多较贫穷的国家现在开始在核武器上投入资金。

examples.english: Their arsenal includes both SAM 7 missiles and anti-tank weapons.
examples.chinese: 他们的武器包括萨姆7型导弹和反坦克武器。

examples.english: Police have discovered an arsenal of guns and ammunition in a London house.
examples.chinese: 警方在伦敦一幢房子里发现了一批枪支和弹药。

examples.english: The two men may be armed, and should not be approached by members of the public.
examples.chinese: 这两名男子可能带着武器，公众切勿接近。

examples.english: Over £60,000 worth of jewellery has been stolen by an armed gang in north London.
examples.chinese: 在伦敦北部，价值六万多英镑的珠宝被一伙武装匪徒抢劫。

examples.english: The men were masked and armed with machine guns.
examples.chinese: 这些男子头带面具，手拿机关枪。

examples.english: a group of heavily armed soldiers
examples.chinese: 一队重武装的士兵

examples.english: It was later discovered that the hijacker was unarmed.
examples.chinese: 后来发现，劫机者没有武器。

examples.english: The army allegedly shot dead over 300 unarmed civilians.
examples.chinese: 据说军队射杀了三百多名手无寸铁的平民。

examples.english: In the first weeks of the war, dozens of defenceless ships were sunk by submarines.
examples.chinese: 战争开始的几周内，许多没有自卫能力的船只被潜水艇击沉。

examples.english: The stick splintered under the blow and Alex was left defenseless.
examples.chinese: 棍子在重击之下裂开，亚历克斯变得无力招架。

centers.english: to get weapons or provide someone with weapons
centers.chinese: 获得武器或为某人提供武器

examples.english: The rebels were trained, armed, and financed by foreign governments.
examples.chinese: 叛乱分子接受外国政府的训练、武装和资助。

examples.english: The majority of people still do not believe we should arm our police force.
examples.chinese: 大部分人仍然不认为我们应当为警察配备武器。

examples.english: We armed ourselves with whatever we could find - sticks, knives, bricks.
examples.chinese: 我们用各种能找到的东西—棍子、刀和砖块把自己武装起来。

examples.english: They remain opposed to any suggestion that the country should be allowed to rearm.
examples.chinese: 他们仍反对允许该国重整军备的建议。

centers.english: to fire a gun or other weapon

examples.english: If you move, I'll shoot.
examples.chinese: 你动一下我就开枪。

examples.english: Make sure you hold the gun steady and shoot straight.
examples.chinese: 一定要把枪端稳，瞄准打过去。

examples.english: Armed robbers who shot at a security guard are still being hunted by police.
examples.chinese: 一群武装劫匪开枪打中了一名保安人员，警方仍在追捕中。

examples.english: We used to shoot at empty bottles for practice.
examples.chinese: 我们以前经常练习射击空瓶子。

examples.english: The Defence Minister had ordered troops to shoot to kill if attacked.
examples.chinese: 国防部长曾经下令军队，遭遇袭击时可以开枪杀人。

examples.english: He regained his balance, took aim, and fired.
examples.chinese: 他重新稳住自己，瞄准目标，然后开枪。

examples.english: The police fired into the air to make the crowd break up.
examples.chinese: 警察朝天鸣枪驱散人群。

examples.english: As soon as we crossed the border, enemy troops started firing at us.
examples.chinese: 我们一越过边境，敌军就开始朝我们开枪射击。

examples.english: Kendrick fired three shots at the President's car.
examples.chinese: 肯德里克朝总统座车开了三枪。

examples.english: Suddenly the car stopped, and the passenger got out and fired a Kalashnikov rifle at the police car.
examples.chinese: 突然，那辆汽车停了下来，车上的人下车用一把卡拉什尼科夫步枪朝警车扫射。

examples.english: The colonel gave the order for the soldiers to open fire.
examples.chinese: 上校下令士兵开火。

examples.english: Troops opened fire on a group of unarmed demonstrators in the city centre.
examples.chinese: 军队在市中心向手无寸铁的游行示威人群开了枪。

examples.english: Agent Cooper stood back and took a shot at the lock on the door.
examples.chinese: 库珀探员往后退，朝门上的锁开了一枪。

examples.english: The police claim that someone took a shot at them, and they had to withdraw for their own safety.
examples.chinese: 警方称有人朝他们开了一枪，他们为了自身的安全不得不撤退。

examples.english: A bird flew out of the tree and Harry took a potshot at it.
examples.chinese: 一只鸟儿从树里飞了出来，哈里就随便地朝它开枪。

examples.english: Somebody was taking potshots at us from behind the bushes.
examples.chinese: 有人在树丛后面朝我们乱开枪。

examples.english: British warships began shelling German positions along the coast.
examples.chinese: 英军战舰开始炮轰德军沿岸阵地。

examples.english: Border towns have been shelled by enemy aircraft for the past two months.
examples.chinese: 边境城镇近两个月来一直遭受敌机的轰炸。
